root.name: All API Services
root.description: Root node containing all API services across all functional domains

cat_sub1.name: Finance & Banking
cat_sub1.description: Services for financial transactions, asset management, banking operations, and market analysis.
cat_sub1.boundary: Core financial operations: payments, investments, banking, compliance. NOT: General business operations, sales transactions, or payroll management.
cat_sub1.decision_rule: If the user wants to conduct monetary transactions, manage financial assets, access banking services, or analyze financial markets, classify here.

cat_sub11.name: Retail & E-commerce
cat_sub11.description: Services for online shopping, product listings, storefront management, and direct sales.
cat_sub11.boundary: Consumer-facing sales platforms and store management. NOT: General marketing, payment processing, or supply chain logistics.
cat_sub11.decision_rule: If the user wants to buy/sell products online, manage an online store, or browse product catalogs, classify here.

cat_sub14.name: Maps & Geospatial
cat_sub14.description: Services for mapping, location data, navigation, and geographic information systems.
cat_sub14.boundary: Location-based services and geographic data. NOT: General data analysis or travel booking.
cat_sub14.decision_rule: If the user wants to view maps, get location-based information, or work with geographic data, classify here.

cat_sub16.name: Industrial & Manufacturing
cat_sub16.description: Services for production processes, supply chain management, equipment monitoring, and industrial operations.
cat_sub16.boundary: Physical production and industrial operations. NOT: General business software, office productivity, or data analysis.
cat_sub16.decision_rule: If the user wants to manage manufacturing processes, monitor industrial equipment, or optimize supply chains, classify here.

cat_sub19.name: Marketing & Sales
cat_sub19.description: Services for advertising, lead generation, customer relationship management, and sales processes.
cat_sub19.boundary: Customer acquisition and relationship management. NOT: General communication tools, e-commerce platforms, or data analytics.
cat_sub19.decision_rule: If the user wants to run marketing campaigns, generate sales leads, manage customer relationships, or track sales, classify here.

cat_sub2.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences
cat_sub2.description: Services for medical care, patient data, pharmaceuticals, and health research.
cat_sub2.boundary: Medical and health-related services. NOT: General wellness, fitness tracking, or scientific research outside healthcare.
cat_sub2.decision_rule: If the user wants to access healthcare services, manage medical data, or research pharmaceuticals, classify here.

cat_sub20.name: Human Resources & Workforce Management
cat_sub20.description: Services for recruiting, employee management, payroll, and workforce development.
cat_sub20.boundary: Employee lifecycle management within organizations. NOT: General business operations, project management, or communication tools.
cat_sub20.decision_rule: If the user wants to hire staff, manage employees, handle payroll, or develop workforce skills, classify here.

cat_sub23a.name: Developer Tools
cat_sub23a.description: Services for software development including coding, testing, debugging, and source code management.
cat_sub23a.boundary: Tools specifically for software creation and maintenance. NOT: General infrastructure, deployment, or end-user applications.
cat_sub23a.decision_rule: If the user wants to write, test, debug, or manage code for software development, classify here.

cat_sub23b.name: Infrastructure Services
cat_sub23b.description: Services for deploying, hosting, monitoring, and operating software systems and networks.
cat_sub23b.boundary: Technical infrastructure and operations. NOT: Application development, data analysis, or end-user tools.
cat_sub23b.decision_rule: If the user wants to deploy, host, monitor, or maintain the infrastructure running software systems, classify here.

cat_sub24a.name: Data Analytics & Business Intelligence
cat_sub24a.description: Services for data analysis, visualization, reporting, and business insights generation.
cat_sub24a.boundary: Data analysis and insight generation. NOT: Data collection, storage, or workflow automation.
cat_sub24a.decision_rule: If the user wants to analyze data, create visualizations, generate reports, or derive business insights, classify here.

cat_sub24b.name: Workflow & Task Automation
cat_sub24b.description: Services for automating business processes, tasks, and operational workflows.
cat_sub24b.boundary: Process automation and task management. NOT: Data analysis, infrastructure management, or communication tools.
cat_sub24b.decision_rule: If the user wants to automate business processes, manage tasks, or streamline operational workflows, classify here.

cat_sub26.name: Scientific Research & Simulation
cat_sub26.description: Services for scientific research, computational analysis, simulation modeling, and discovery.
cat_sub26.boundary: Scientific discovery and computational research. NOT: Business analytics, engineering design, or general data processing.
cat_sub26.decision_rule: If the user wants to conduct scientific research, run simulations, or perform advanced computational analysis for discovery, classify here.

cat_sub27.name: Search & Discovery
cat_sub27.description: Services for finding information, resources, or services across networks and databases.
cat_sub27.boundary: Information retrieval and resource discovery. NOT: Data analysis, content management, or communication tools.
cat_sub27.decision_rule: If the user wants to search for information, discover resources, or find available services, classify here.

cat_sub29.name: Translation & Language Services
cat_sub29.description: Services for text translation, language processing, and multilingual content handling.
cat_sub29.boundary: Language translation and processing. NOT: General communication tools, content creation, or data analysis.
cat_sub29.decision_rule: If the user wants to translate text, process language, or handle multilingual content, classify here.

cat_sub3.name: Travel & Hospitality
cat_sub3.description: Services for booking travel, accommodation, and accessing transportation information.
cat_sub3.boundary: Travel planning and hospitality services. NOT: General mapping, payment processing, or communication tools.
cat_sub3.decision_rule: If the user wants to book or plan travel, find accommodation, or check transportation schedules, classify here.

cat_sub30.name: Platform Integration & Connectors
cat_sub30.description: Services for connecting systems, APIs, and platforms to enable interoperability.
cat_sub30.boundary: System integration and connectivity. NOT: Individual application functionality or standalone services.
cat_sub30.decision_rule: If the user wants to connect different systems, integrate APIs, or enable platform interoperability, classify here.

cat_sub4.name: Media & Entertainment
cat_sub4.description: Services for consuming, creating, or distributing entertainment content like music, video, and games.
cat_sub4.boundary: Entertainment content and experiences. NOT: News, educational content, or communication tools.
cat_sub4.decision_rule: If the user wants to be entertained, play games, consume media, or create artistic content, classify here.

cat_sub5.name: News & Information
cat_sub5.description: Services for accessing current news, reports, reviews, and general information.
cat_sub5.boundary: News and informational content. NOT: Educational materials, entertainment content, or communication tools.
cat_sub5.decision_rule: If the user wants to read news, get current events updates, or access informational content, classify here.

cat_sub6.name: Social & Community
cat_sub6.description: Services for connecting people, building communities, and managing social interactions.
cat_sub6.boundary: Social networking and community platforms. NOT: General communication tools, content sharing, or collaboration platforms.
cat_sub6.decision_rule: If the user wants to interact with social networks, participate in communities, or manage social media, classify here.

cat_sub7.name: Communication
cat_sub7.description: Services for direct messaging, email, notifications, and person-to-person communication.
cat_sub7.boundary: Direct communication between people or systems. NOT: Social networking, community platforms, or workflow automation.
cat_sub7.decision_rule: If the user wants to send messages, emails, or notifications to people or systems, classify here.

cat_sub8.name: Education & Learning
cat_sub8.description: Services for teaching, learning, skill development, and accessing educational content.
cat_sub8.boundary: Educational content and learning experiences. NOT: News, entertainment, or general information services.
cat_sub8.decision_rule: If the user wants to learn skills, take courses, or access educational materials, classify here.

cat_sub9.name: Government & Civic Data
cat_sub9.description: Services providing access to public sector data, legal information, and civic resources.
cat_sub9.boundary: Government and public sector information. NOT: General data services, news, or business information.
cat_sub9.decision_rule: If the user wants to access government data, legal statutes, or public records, classify here.

cat_fin_10.name: Compliance, Risk & Security Screening
cat_fin_10.description: Services for regulatory compliance, fraud detection, risk scoring, and sanctions screening.
cat_fin_10.boundary: Focus on regulatory, security, or fraud-related checks. Excludes general financial analysis.
cat_fin_10.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs regulatory, security, or fraud checks on entities/transactions, classify here.

cat_fin_11.name: Financial Research, Intelligence & Analytics
cat_fin_11.description: Services providing financial analysis, company research, portfolio analytics, and formatted reports.
cat_fin_11.boundary: Focus on in-depth analysis, research, modeling, and portfolio/wealth analytics. Excludes raw data feeds.
cat_fin_11.decision_rule: If the service primarily delivers research, financial intelligence, portfolio analysis, or reports, classify here.

cat_fin_12.name: Macroeconomic & Institutional Data
cat_fin_12.description: Services for accessing central bank data, economic indicators, and institutional filings.
cat_fin_12.boundary: Focus on macroeconomic and large-scale institutional datasets. Excludes company-specific financials.
cat_fin_12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides macroeconomic data, central bank communications, or institutional datasets, classify here.

cat_fin_13.name: Trading Automation & Execution
cat_fin_13.description: Services for designing, backtesting, and automating trading strategies across all asset classes.
cat_fin_13.boundary: Focus on automation and orchestration of trading algorithms. Includes traditional and crypto markets.
cat_fin_13.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables programming, automation, or execution of trading algorithms, classify here.

cat_fin_14.name: On-Chain Analytics & Digital Asset Security
cat_fin_14.description: Services for analyzing blockchain data, tracking wallets, and securing digital assets.
cat_fin_14.boundary: Focus on blockchain analytics, wallet tracking, and digital asset custody/security solutions.
cat_fin_14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides on-chain analytics, wallet intelligence, or digital asset custody, classify here.

cat_fin_16.name: Financial ERP, Operations & Industry Solutions
cat_fin_16.description: Services integrating with ERP/CRM for operations, billing, and industry-specific finance (e.g., real estate).
cat_fin_16.boundary: Focus on enterprise business systems for financial operations and industry verticals. Excludes accounting software.
cat_fin_16.decision_rule: If the service connects to ERP/CRM systems (e.g., NetSuite, Salesforce) for operations or handles industry-specific financial data, classify here.

cat_fin_18.name: Financial News & Sentiment Analysis
cat_fin_18.description: Services providing financial news feeds, earnings transcripts, and market sentiment data.
cat_fin_18.boundary: Focus on news content, transcripts, and derived sentiment/event data. Excludes raw price data feeds.
cat_fin_18.decision_rule: If the service primarily supplies news feeds, transcripts, or sentiment/event analysis, classify here.

cat_fin_2.name: Cryptocurrency & Digital Asset Trading
cat_fin_2.description: Services for trading and accessing market data on centralized cryptocurrency exchanges (CEXs).
cat_fin_2.boundary: Focus on centralized crypto exchanges. Excludes DeFi, custody, and blockchain infrastructure.
cat_fin_2.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to centralized crypto exchanges (e.g., Coinbase, Binance) for trading or market data, classify here.

cat_fin_3.name: Decentralized Finance (DeFi) Operations
cat_fin_3.description: Services for interacting with DeFi protocols for swaps, liquidity, yield, and governance.
cat_fin_3.boundary: Focus on decentralized applications and smart contracts. Excludes centralized exchange trading and base-layer infrastructure.
cat_fin_3.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables interactions with DEXs, lending protocols, or other DeFi dApps, classify here.

cat_fin_4.name: Blockchain Infrastructure & Node Services
cat_fin_4.description: Services for running nodes, accessing RPC endpoints, and managing blockchain networks.
cat_fin_4.boundary: Focus on base-layer blockchain access, node operations, and network management. Excludes on-chain analytics and DeFi.
cat_fin_4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides infrastructure for reading/writing to blockchains or managing nodes, classify here.

cat_fin_5.name: Payment Processing & Gateways
cat_fin_5.description: Services for processing payments, managing transactions, and integrating payment gateways.
cat_fin_5.boundary: Focus on the movement of funds. Includes cross-border, multi-currency, and crypto payment services.
cat_fin_5.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates the initiation, processing, or settlement of payments, classify here.

cat_fin_6.name: Banking, Cards & Credit Data
cat_fin_6.description: Services for accessing bank accounts, credit cards, transactions, and credit/financing data.
cat_fin_6.boundary: Focus on account data aggregation, credit data access, and basic banking functions. Includes lending data feeds.
cat_fin_6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides read/write access to traditional banking, card accounts, or credit data, classify here.

cat_fin_7.name: Accounting & Bookkeeping Integration
cat_fin_7.description: Services for interacting with accounting platforms to manage invoices, expenses, and ledgers.
cat_fin_7.boundary: Focus on accounting software integration (e.g., Xero, QuickBooks). Excludes ERP and subscription billing.
cat_fin_7.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with accounting software for financial data management, classify here.

cat_fin_8.name: Financial Market Data Feeds
cat_fin_8.description: Services providing real-time and historical price, quote, and order book data for all asset classes.
cat_fin_8.boundary: Focus on raw market data feeds and indicators. Excludes news, sentiment, and structured research reports.
cat_fin_8.decision_rule: If the service primarily supplies real-time/historical price data, quotes, or order books, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub1.name: Customer Relationship Management
cat_sub19_sub1.description: Services for managing customer data, contacts, companies, and interactions within CRM platforms like Salesforce and HubSpot.
cat_sub19_sub1.boundary: NOT advertising platforms, email marketing tools, or social media management. For those, see Advertising Platforms, Email Marketing, and Social Media Management.
cat_sub19_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages customer/contact data, sales pipelines, or integrates with core CRM systems, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub11.name: Customer Data Platforms
cat_sub19_sub11.description: Services for centralizing, retrieving, and updating unified customer profiles from a single platform.
cat_sub19_sub11.boundary: NOT individual channel messaging or campaign management. For those, see Messaging & Chat and Email Marketing.
cat_sub19_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with a centralized platform that unifies customer data from multiple sources, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub12.name: Marketing Automation
cat_sub19_sub12.description: Services for automating marketing workflows, customer journeys, and cross-channel messaging sequences.
cat_sub19_sub12.boundary: NOT one-off email sends or manual campaign creation. For those, see Email Marketing and Advertising Platforms.
cat_sub19_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates multi-step marketing workflows or customer communication sequences, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub13.name: Customer Support
cat_sub19_sub13.description: Services for accessing, managing, and analyzing customer support tickets and help desk interactions.
cat_sub19_sub13.boundary: NOT sales pipeline management or marketing outreach. For those, see Customer Relationship Management and Email Marketing.
cat_sub19_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or manages customer support tickets and help desk data, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub15.name: Content & Creative Production
cat_sub19_sub15.description: Services for generating and editing marketing content, including images, videos, presentations, and social posts.
cat_sub19_sub15.boundary: NOT scheduling/publishing content or analyzing its performance. For those, see Social Media Management and Marketing Analytics.
cat_sub19_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, edits, or generates visual/audio content or presentations for marketing, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub16.name: Marketing Analytics
cat_sub19_sub16.description: Services for tracking, measuring, and reporting on the performance of marketing campaigns and initiatives.
cat_sub19_sub16.boundary: NOT sales performance analytics or SEO keyword research. For those, see Sales Intelligence & Analytics and SEO & Content Research.
cat_sub19_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes the performance and ROI of marketing campaigns across channels, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub19.name: Cross-Channel Engagement
cat_sub19_sub19.description: Services for managing customer interactions and conversations across multiple channels like email, chat, and social.
cat_sub19_sub19.boundary: NOT single-channel messaging (e.g., just email) or audience analytics. For those, see Email Marketing and Audience & Customer Intelligence.
cat_sub19_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages unified customer conversations across several different communication channels, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub2.name: Email Marketing
cat_sub19_sub2.description: Services for sending emails, managing campaigns, templates, contact lists, and tracking email performance metrics.
cat_sub19_sub2.boundary: NOT general CRM contact management or SMS/WhatsApp messaging. For those, see Customer Relationship Management and Messaging & Chat.
cat_sub19_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily sends bulk emails, manages email campaigns/lists, or tracks email analytics, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub3.name: Advertising Platforms
cat_sub19_sub3.description: Services for creating, managing, and analyzing paid advertising campaigns across platforms like Google, Meta, TikTok, and Amazon.
cat_sub19_sub3.boundary: NOT organic social media posting/analytics or SEO. For those, see Social Media Management and SEO & Content Research.
cat_sub19_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages paid ad campaigns, targets audiences, or analyzes ad performance on ad networks, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub4.name: Social Media Management
cat_sub19_sub4.description: Services for scheduling posts, analyzing performance metrics, and managing organic presence across social media platforms.
cat_sub19_sub4.boundary: NOT paid advertising campaign management or email marketing. For those, see Advertising Platforms and Email Marketing.
cat_sub19_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily schedules organic posts or analyzes engagement metrics across social media profiles, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub6.name: Messaging & Chat
cat_sub19_sub6.description: Services for sending and managing SMS, WhatsApp, and other chat-based messages for customer communication.
cat_sub19_sub6.boundary: NOT email marketing or voice/video communication. For those, see Email Marketing and Communication Platforms.
cat_sub19_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily sends/manages text-based messages (SMS, WhatsApp) for customer engagement, classify here.

cat_sub19_sub8.name: Lead Generation & Prospecting
cat_sub19_sub8.description: Services for finding, verifying, and enriching business contact information (B2B) and company data.
cat_sub19_sub8.boundary: NOT managing existing customer relationships or sending outreach messages. For those, see Customer Relationship Management and Messaging & Chat.
cat_sub19_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds/verifies business email addresses, contacts, or company data for prospecting, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1.name: Code Development
cat_sub23a_sub1.description: Tools for writing, editing, debugging, and versioning source code
cat_sub23a_sub1.boundary: Core coding activities: IDEs, code editors, debuggers, linters, version control. Excludes testing, deployment, and infrastructure.
cat_sub23a_sub1.decision_rule: If the user wants to write, edit, debug, or manage version control for source code, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub10.name: Web Content
cat_sub23a_sub10.description: Services for creating, managing, and publishing web content
cat_sub23a_sub10.boundary: CMS, site builders, blogging platforms, content publishing. Excludes web automation and media creation tools.
cat_sub23a_sub10.decision_rule: If the user wants to create, manage, or publish content for websites, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub11.name: Creative Media
cat_sub23a_sub11.description: Tools for creating and editing images, videos, 3D models, and audio
cat_sub23a_sub11.boundary: Image/video/audio editing, 3D modeling, digital art, music production. Includes architectural/engineering design tools. Excludes game dev and AI generation.
cat_sub23a_sub11.decision_rule: If the user wants to create or edit visual media, 3D models, or audio content, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub12.name: Finance
cat_sub23a_sub12.description: Financial tools for payments, accounting, trading, and analysis
cat_sub23a_sub12.boundary: Payment processing, accounting software, trading platforms, financial APIs. Excludes general data analysis and e-commerce platforms.
cat_sub23a_sub12.decision_rule: If the user wants financial services for payments, accounting, trading, or analysis, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13.name: AI & Machine Learning
cat_sub23a_sub13.description: Tools for developing, training, and deploying machine learning models
cat_sub23a_sub13.boundary: ML frameworks, model training platforms, MLops, specialized AI APIs. Excludes AI assistants and general data science.
cat_sub23a_sub13.decision_rule: If the user wants to develop, train, or deploy machine learning models, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14.name: Data Integration
cat_sub23a_sub14.description: Services for connecting, transforming, and moving data between systems
cat_sub23a_sub14.boundary: ETL/ELT tools, data pipelines, API connectors, data synchronization. Excludes database management and workflow automation.
cat_sub23a_sub14.decision_rule: If the user wants to integrate, transform, or move data between different systems, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub15.name: Game Development
cat_sub23a_sub15.description: Tools for creating, testing, and deploying video games
cat_sub23a_sub15.boundary: Game engines, asset pipelines, game testing, platform SDKs. Includes gaming platforms/services. Excludes 3D modeling for non-games.
cat_sub23a_sub15.decision_rule: If the user wants to develop, test, deploy, or provide services for video games, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub16.name: User Authentication
cat_sub23a_sub16.description: Services for user identity verification, login, and access control
cat_sub23a_sub16.boundary: Auth providers, SSO, identity management, access tokens. Excludes general software security and database management.
cat_sub23a_sub16.decision_rule: If the user wants to verify identities, manage logins, or control access, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2.name: AI Assistant & Chat
cat_sub23a_sub2.description: AI-powered assistants for conversation, content generation, and task automation
cat_sub23a_sub2.boundary: Chatbots, conversational AI, content generation assistants, general task automation. Excludes code-specific AI and ML model training.
cat_sub23a_sub2.decision_rule: If the user wants an AI assistant for conversation, content creation, or general task help, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21.name: DevOps & Deployment
cat_sub23a_sub21.description: Tools for building, deploying, and managing software in production environments
cat_sub23a_sub21.boundary: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, infrastructure as code, deployment automation. Excludes code writing and system monitoring.
cat_sub23a_sub21.decision_rule: If the user wants to automate software builds, deployments, or manage production infrastructure, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22.name: Developer Communities & Documentation
cat_sub23a_sub22.description: Platforms for developer collaboration, knowledge sharing, and technical documentation
cat_sub23a_sub22.boundary: Developer forums, documentation tools, community platforms, tech discussion hubs. Excludes general productivity and code development tools.
cat_sub23a_sub22.decision_rule: If the user wants a platform for developer collaboration, knowledge sharing, or technical documentation, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3.name: Productivity & Workflow
cat_sub23a_sub3.description: Tools for personal and team productivity, task management, and automation
cat_sub23a_sub3.boundary: Task management, workflow automation, collaboration tools, note-taking. Includes document conversion tools. Excludes specialized domain tools.
cat_sub23a_sub3.decision_rule: If the user wants to manage tasks, automate workflows, or improve personal/team productivity, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4.name: Database Management
cat_sub23a_sub4.description: Services for storing, querying, and managing structured data
cat_sub23a_sub4.boundary: Database systems, query tools, database administration, data storage. Excludes data science analysis and data integration.
cat_sub23a_sub4.decision_rule: If the user wants to store, query, or manage database systems, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5.name: Software Security
cat_sub23a_sub5.description: Tools for securing applications, detecting vulnerabilities, and protecting data
cat_sub23a_sub5.boundary: Security scanning, vulnerability detection, code analysis, encryption. Excludes system monitoring and user authentication.
cat_sub23a_sub5.decision_rule: If the user wants to secure software applications, detect vulnerabilities, or protect code/data, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub6.name: System Monitoring
cat_sub23a_sub6.description: Tools for monitoring application performance, infrastructure, and system health
cat_sub23a_sub6.boundary: APM, infrastructure monitoring, log analysis, performance metrics. Includes DevOps automation tools. Excludes security monitoring.
cat_sub23a_sub6.decision_rule: If the user wants to monitor system performance, infrastructure health, or application metrics, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7.name: Information Search
cat_sub23a_sub7.description: Services for searching and retrieving documents, content, and information
cat_sub23a_sub7.boundary: Search engines, document search, content retrieval, enterprise search. Excludes database querying and web content creation.
cat_sub23a_sub7.decision_rule: If the user wants to search for documents, content, or information across sources, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8.name: Software Testing
cat_sub23a_sub8.description: Tools for testing software applications, APIs, and code quality
cat_sub23a_sub8.boundary: Testing frameworks, API testing, QA automation, test management. Excludes system monitoring and security testing.
cat_sub23a_sub8.decision_rule: If the user wants to test software, APIs, or ensure code quality, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub9.name: Data Science
cat_sub23a_sub9.description: Tools for data analysis, statistical modeling, and scientific computing
cat_sub23a_sub9.boundary: Data analysis platforms, statistical tools, visualization, scientific computing. Includes geographic analysis. Excludes ML development and database management.
cat_sub23a_sub9.decision_rule: If the user wants to analyze data, build statistical models, or perform scientific computing, classify here.

cat_sub23b_sub1.name: Database Management
cat_sub23b_sub1.description: Services for creating, querying, managing, and interacting with databases (SQL, NoSQL, vector).
cat_sub23b_sub1.boundary: Direct database operations like queries, schema management, and performance tuning.
cat_sub23b_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here ONLY if the service's primary function is to execute database operations (queries, CRUD) or manage database objects (tables, indexes). NOT for general cloud APIs that include database calls.

cat_sub23b_sub10.name: Security & Compliance
cat_sub23b_sub10.description: Services for vulnerability scanning, security analysis, audit logging, and compliance checks.
cat_sub23b_sub10.boundary: Proactive security scanning, policy enforcement, and compliance validation.
cat_sub23b_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily scans for vulnerabilities, enforces security policies, or validates compliance.

cat_sub23b_sub11.name: CI/CD, Deployment & Version Control
cat_sub23b_sub11.description: Services for building, testing, deploying applications, and managing source code repositories.
cat_sub23b_sub11.boundary: End-to-end software delivery pipeline and source code management.
cat_sub23b_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily triggers builds, manages deployments, controls CI/CD pipelines, or interacts with version control systems (e.g., Git).

cat_sub23b_sub12.name: Workflow Automation & Scheduling
cat_sub23b_sub12.description: Services for creating, managing, executing automated workflows, and scheduling tasks.
cat_sub23b_sub12.boundary: Orchestration of multi-step, cross-system processes with conditional logic and time-based triggers.
cat_sub23b_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily orchestrates business/IT processes (n8n, Power Automate) OR schedules future tasks/events.

cat_sub23b_sub13.name: Secrets Management
cat_sub23b_sub13.description: Services for securely storing, retrieving, and rotating sensitive credentials and certificates.
cat_sub23b_sub13.boundary: Secure storage and lifecycle management of secrets, not general configuration.
cat_sub23b_sub13.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily handles the secure storage and lifecycle management of secrets (e.g., API keys, passwords).

cat_sub23b_sub14.name: Code Execution & Sandbox
cat_sub23b_sub14.description: Services for executing code in isolated, secure environments, supporting multiple languages.
cat_sub23b_sub14.boundary: Isolated runtime for code snippets or scripts, not full application deployment.
cat_sub23b_sub14.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides a secure, isolated environment to run code snippets or scripts.

cat_sub23b_sub15.name: Blockchain Operations
cat_sub23b_sub15.description: Services for interacting with blockchain networks, smart contracts, and digital assets.
cat_sub23b_sub15.boundary: Operations specific to blockchain protocols, token standards, and on-chain interactions.
cat_sub23b_sub15.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily interacts with blockchain networks, deploys smart contracts, or manages digital assets (e.g., tokens, NFTs).

cat_sub23b_sub16.name: Device & IoT Management
cat_sub23b_sub16.description: Services for controlling, monitoring, and managing physical devices and IoT fleets.
cat_sub23b_sub16.boundary: Management of physical hardware, embedded systems, and IoT sensors.
cat_sub23b_sub16.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily manages physical hardware, embedded devices, or IoT sensors.

cat_sub23b_sub17.name: Media Processing
cat_sub23b_sub17.description: Services for generating, transforming, or analyzing images, video, and audio content.
cat_sub23b_sub17.boundary: Content creation and manipulation for visual or auditory media.
cat_sub23b_sub17.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily generates or processes image, video, or audio media.

cat_sub23b_sub18.name: Web & API Interaction
cat_sub23b_sub18.description: Services for browser automation, web scraping, API testing, and simulating HTTP requests.
cat_sub23b_sub18.boundary: Automation and testing at the web application and API layer.
cat_sub23b_sub18.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily automates browser interactions, scrapes web content, or tests APIs.

cat_sub23b_sub19.name: Data Integration & ETL
cat_sub23b_sub19.description: Services for moving, transforming, and integrating data between systems and formats.
cat_sub23b_sub19.boundary: Data pipeline construction, format conversion, and cross-system data movement.
cat_sub23b_sub19.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily moves data between systems, transforms data formats (e.g., JSON to CSV), or builds data pipelines.

cat_sub23b_sub2.name: Cloud Resource Orchestration
cat_sub23b_sub2.description: Services for provisioning and managing cloud infrastructure using IaC or cloud APIs.
cat_sub23b_sub2.boundary: Declarative or imperative management of cloud resource stacks and configurations.
cat_sub23b_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily creates, lists, or manages cloud infrastructure resources via IaC (e.g., Terraform) or cloud-specific SDKs. NOT for general-purpose cloud CLI tools that span multiple service categories.

cat_sub23b_sub20.name: Serverless & Functions
cat_sub23b_sub20.description: Services for deploying, invoking, and managing serverless functions and event-driven workloads.
cat_sub23b_sub20.boundary: Management and execution of ephemeral, event-triggered functions.
cat_sub23b_sub20.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily deploys or manages serverless functions (e.g., AWS Lambda, Cloud Functions).

cat_sub23b_sub3.name: Monitoring, Observability & Cost Management
cat_sub23b_sub3.description: Services for querying metrics, logs, traces, and analyzing cloud infrastructure spending.
cat_sub23b_sub3.boundary: System performance telemetry, health checks, and cloud cost analysis/optimization.
cat_sub23b_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily queries system performance data (metrics, logs, traces) or analyzes/optimizes cloud infrastructure costs.

cat_sub23b_sub4.name: Message Queue & Streaming
cat_sub23b_sub4.description: Services for publishing, consuming, and managing messages within brokers or streaming platforms.
cat_sub23b_sub4.boundary: Interaction with asynchronous messaging and event streaming systems.
cat_sub23b_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily interacts with message brokers or streaming platforms (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ).

cat_sub23b_sub5.name: Object & File Storage
cat_sub23b_sub5.description: Services for uploading, downloading, and managing objects and files in storage systems.
cat_sub23b_sub5.boundary: Storage and retrieval of unstructured files and objects.
cat_sub23b_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily handles storage and retrieval of unstructured files/objects (e.g., S3, Cloudinary).

cat_sub23b_sub6.name: Container & Orchestration
cat_sub23b_sub6.description: Services for managing containers, runtimes, and orchestration platforms like Kubernetes.
cat_sub23b_sub6.boundary: Management of containerized workloads and orchestration platform resources.
cat_sub23b_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily manages containers, pods, or Kubernetes/Docker resources.

cat_sub23b_sub7.name: Compute & Virtualization
cat_sub23b_sub7.description: Services for managing virtual machines, servers, and compute instances.
cat_sub23b_sub7.boundary: Provisioning and control of virtualized compute resources.
cat_sub23b_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provisions, controls, or monitors virtual machines or compute instances.

cat_sub23b_sub8.name: Networking
cat_sub23b_sub8.description: Services for network device management, topology analysis, DNS, and connectivity testing.
cat_sub23b_sub8.boundary: Configuration and analysis of network infrastructure and protocols.
cat_sub23b_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily configures or analyzes network devices, protocols, or connectivity.

cat_sub23b_sub9.name: Identity & Access Management
cat_sub23b_sub9.description: Services for user authentication, authorization, role management, and SSO.
cat_sub23b_sub9.boundary: Management of user identities, authentication flows, and access permissions.
cat_sub23b_sub9.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily manages user identities, authentication, or access permissions.

cat_sub24a_sub1.name: Financial Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub1.description: Analyzing financial markets, investments, trading data, economic indicators, and financial transactions.
cat_sub24a_sub1.boundary: Focus on financial markets, investments, trading, and macroeconomic data analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes financial markets, investments, trading, macroeconomic data, or financial transaction patterns, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub11.name: Sports & Gaming Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub11.description: Analyzing sports performance, gaming statistics, player data, match history, and competitive metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub11.boundary: Focus on sports, gaming, and competitive event data analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes sports performance, gaming statistics, player/match data, or competitive event metrics, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub12.name: Geospatial & Location Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub12.description: Analyzing geographic data, location information, maps, spatial relationships, and location-based metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub12.boundary: Focus on geographic, mapping, spatial, and location-based data analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes geographic, mapping, spatial, or location-based data, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub13.name: Blockchain & Cryptocurrency Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub13.description: Analyzing blockchain transactions, on-chain data, wallet behavior, DeFi protocols, and crypto metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub13.boundary: Focus on blockchain, on-chain data, and cryptocurrency network analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes blockchain transactions, on-chain data, wallet behavior, or cryptocurrency network metrics, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub14.name: Research & Academic Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub14.description: Analyzing academic research, scholarly publications, citation data, research metrics, and scientific datasets.
cat_sub24a_sub14.boundary: Focus on academic, scholarly, scientific, and research data analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes academic research, publications, citations, or scientific datasets, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub15.name: Government & Public Sector Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub15.description: Analyzing government data, public records, census information, regulatory data, and public metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub15.boundary: Focus on government datasets, public records, and regulatory information analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes government datasets, public records, census data, or regulatory information, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub18.name: Data Engineering & Processing
cat_sub24a_sub18.description: Services for data pipelines, ETL/ELT, workflow orchestration, data transformation, and processing.
cat_sub24a_sub18.boundary: Focus on data movement, transformation, pipeline orchestration, and processing workflows.
cat_sub24a_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data pipeline, ETL/ELT, workflow orchestration, or data transformation capabilities, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub19.name: Database & Query Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub19.description: Services for database interaction, SQL query generation, data exploration, and database analytics.
cat_sub24a_sub19.boundary: Focus on database access, querying, data exploration, and database-specific analytics.
cat_sub24a_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides database interaction, SQL query generation, data exploration, or database analytics capabilities, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub2.name: Business Intelligence Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub2.description: Analyzing internal business operations, sales, marketing, enterprise spending, supply chain, and operational metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub2.boundary: Focus on enterprise operational data, sales, marketing, spending, supply chain, logistics, and business performance metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes sales, marketing, internal enterprise operational data, supply chain, logistics, or business performance metrics, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub20.name: AI & Machine Learning Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub20.description: Services for AI model evaluation, ML experiment tracking, vector search, embeddings, and AI data analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub20.boundary: Focus on AI/ML-specific data analysis, model evaluation, and machine learning operations.
cat_sub24a_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides AI model evaluation, ML experiment tracking, vector search, embeddings, or AI-specific data analysis, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub21.name: Visualization & Reporting
cat_sub24a_sub21.description: Services for generating charts, dashboards, reports, presentations, and data visualizations.
cat_sub24a_sub21.boundary: Focus on chart generation, report creation, dashboard building, and presentation automation.
cat_sub24a_sub21.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides chart generation, report creation, dashboard building, or presentation automation capabilities, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub22.name: Document & Content Intelligence
cat_sub24a_sub22.description: Analyzing documents, extracting information, semantic search, and intelligent document processing.
cat_sub24a_sub22.boundary: Focus on document analysis, information extraction, semantic search, and document management.
cat_sub24a_sub22.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes documents, extracts information, provides semantic search, or manages document intelligence, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub3.name: Customer & Marketing Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub3.description: Analyzing customer behavior, segmentation, marketing campaigns, customer journey, and conversion metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub3.boundary: Focus on customer-facing data, marketing effectiveness, and customer lifecycle analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes customer behavior, segmentation, marketing campaign performance, or customer journey data, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub4.name: Product & User Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub4.description: Analyzing product usage, user behavior, feature adoption, and application engagement metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub4.boundary: Focus on product-specific usage data and user interaction within applications.
cat_sub24a_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes product usage, user behavior within applications, or feature adoption for product improvement, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub5.name: IT & Infrastructure Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub5.description: Analyzing IT systems, cloud infrastructure, network performance, logs, industrial IoT, and operational monitoring.
cat_sub24a_sub5.boundary: Focus on technical infrastructure, systems monitoring, operational technology, and industrial/IoT sensor data.
cat_sub24a_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes IT systems, cloud resources, network data, logs, infrastructure monitoring, or industrial/IoT sensor data, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub6.name: Security & Compliance Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub6.description: Analyzing security events, threats, compliance frameworks, audit data, and legal/regulatory evidence.
cat_sub24a_sub6.boundary: Focus on security, risk, compliance, and legal/regulatory data analysis.
cat_sub24a_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes security events, threats, compliance status, audit data, or legal/regulatory evidence, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub7.name: Healthcare & Wellness Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub7.description: Analyzing clinical data, health metrics, medical records, biomedical research, and wellness tracking.
cat_sub24a_sub7.boundary: Focus on medical, clinical, biomedical, and personal health/wellness data.
cat_sub24a_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes clinical, medical, patient health, biomedical research, or personal wellness data, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub8.name: Media & Content Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub8.description: Analyzing media files, video/audio content, publishing platforms, and content performance metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub8.boundary: Focus on media content analysis and publishing platform performance.
cat_sub24a_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes media files, video/audio content, or publishing platform content performance, classify here.

cat_sub24a_sub9.name: Web & Digital Analytics
cat_sub24a_sub9.description: Analyzing website traffic, SEO performance, search data, online advertising, and digital marketing metrics.
cat_sub24a_sub9.boundary: Focus on web traffic, search, SEO, and digital advertising performance.
cat_sub24a_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes website traffic, SEO, search, or online advertising performance data, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub1.name: Software Development & DevOps
cat_sub24b_sub1.description: Services that automate coding, testing, deployment, infrastructure management, and other software development lifecycle tasks.
cat_sub24b_sub1.boundary: NOT general project management, data analysis, or media creation. For project management of non-software tasks, see 'Project & Task Management'.
cat_sub24b_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates tasks related to writing, building, testing, deploying, or managing software code and its runtime infrastructure, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub10.name: Finance & Accounting
cat_sub24b_sub10.description: Services that automate invoicing, payments, financial reporting, subscription billing, and accounting operations.
cat_sub24b_sub10.boundary: NOT general business data analysis or e-commerce. For data analytics, see 'Data Processing & Analytics'.
cat_sub24b_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates tasks related to financial transactions, billing, invoicing, or bookkeeping, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub11.name: IT & Systems Administration
cat_sub24b_sub11.description: Services that automate IT infrastructure monitoring, system updates, network management, and IT service desk tasks.
cat_sub24b_sub11.boundary: NOT software deployment or cloud resource provisioning for development. For DevOps, see 'Software Development & DevOps'.
cat_sub24b_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates the monitoring, maintenance, or troubleshooting of IT systems, networks, or hardware, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub12.name: Security & Compliance
cat_sub24b_sub12.description: Services that automate security scanning, vulnerability assessment, access control, and compliance auditing.
cat_sub24b_sub12.boundary: NOT general IT system monitoring. For IT health monitoring, see 'IT & Systems Administration'.
cat_sub24b_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates detecting security risks, enforcing policies, or verifying regulatory compliance, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub13.name: E-commerce & Payments
cat_sub24b_sub13.description: Services that automate online store operations, payment processing, order management, and cryptocurrency transactions.
cat_sub24b_sub13.boundary: NOT general financial accounting or invoicing. For accounting, see 'Finance & Accounting'.
cat_sub24b_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates managing an online storefront, processing payments, or handling cryptocurrency trades, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub14.name: Human Resources
cat_sub24b_sub14.description: Services that automate employee onboarding, performance reviews, scheduling, and HR platform interactions.
cat_sub24b_sub14.boundary: NOT general team project management or communication. For team task management, see 'Project & Task Management'.
cat_sub24b_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates processes related to employee management, recruitment, or HR administration, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub15.name: Browser & Web Automation
cat_sub24b_sub15.description: Services that automate web browsing, data scraping, form filling, and web application testing.
cat_sub24b_sub15.boundary: NOT mobile app testing or desktop application automation. For mobile, see 'Mobile & Device Automation'.
cat_sub24b_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates interactions with websites or web applications through a browser, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub16.name: Mobile & Device Automation
cat_sub24b_sub16.description: Services that automate testing, control, and interaction with mobile devices, simulators, and smart devices.
cat_sub24b_sub16.boundary: NOT web browser automation or desktop computer control. For browsers, see 'Browser & Web Automation'.
cat_sub24b_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates tasks on mobile phones, tablets, IoT devices, or smart home gadgets, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub17.name: Desktop & OS Automation
cat_sub24b_sub17.description: Services that automate control of desktop operating systems, including file management, application control, and GUI interactions.
cat_sub24b_sub17.boundary: NOT web or mobile automation. For those, see 'Browser & Web Automation' or 'Mobile & Device Automation'.
cat_sub24b_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates mouse, keyboard, or file system operations on a desktop computer (Windows/macOS), classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub18.name: API & Integration Management
cat_sub24b_sub18.description: Services that automate the discovery, connection, and orchestration of multiple APIs and integrated services.
cat_sub24b_sub18.boundary: NOT using a single API for a specific task (e.g., just sending emails). For specific functional automations, see other categories.
cat_sub24b_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates managing, connecting, or orchestrating between multiple different APIs or integration platforms, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub19.name: Workflow Orchestration
cat_sub24b_sub19.description: Services that provide the core engine or platform for designing, executing, and monitoring multi-step automated workflows.
cat_sub24b_sub19.boundary: NOT executing a single automated task (e.g., scraping a website). For specific task automations, see other categories.
cat_sub24b_sub19.decision_rule: If the service is primarily a platform or engine that coordinates and executes sequences of tasks from other tools/services, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub2.name: Project & Task Management
cat_sub24b_sub2.description: Services that automate the creation, tracking, and coordination of tasks, projects, and team workflows.
cat_sub24b_sub2.boundary: NOT software-specific development tasks (see 'Software Development & DevOps') or customer relationship tasks (see 'Sales & CRM').
cat_sub24b_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates the management of to-do lists, project boards, sprints, or team coordination workflows, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub20.name: Specialized Industry Tools
cat_sub24b_sub20.description: Services that automate workflows for specific industries like legal (e-signatures), healthcare, real estate, or scientific research.
cat_sub24b_sub20.boundary: NOT general business functions like project management or CRM. For those, see 'Project & Task Management' or 'Sales & CRM'.
cat_sub24b_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates processes unique to a specific professional industry (e.g., property management, legal contracts, lab research), classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub3.name: Sales & CRM
cat_sub24b_sub3.description: Services that automate customer relationship management, lead generation, sales pipelines, and client interactions.
cat_sub24b_sub3.boundary: NOT general marketing campaigns or product feedback collection. For marketing, see 'Marketing & Content'.
cat_sub24b_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates processes related to managing sales opportunities, customer accounts, or client communications, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub4.name: Marketing & Content
cat_sub24b_sub4.description: Services that automate content creation, social media management, marketing campaigns, and audience engagement.
cat_sub24b_sub4.boundary: NOT sales pipeline management or customer support. For sales, see 'Sales & CRM'.
cat_sub24b_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates the creation, scheduling, publishing, or analysis of marketing content and campaigns, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub5.name: Data Processing & Analytics
cat_sub24b_sub5.description: Services that automate data extraction, transformation, loading (ETL), analysis, and visualization workflows.
cat_sub24b_sub5.boundary: NOT software development data or infrastructure monitoring. For DevOps data, see 'Software Development & DevOps'.
cat_sub24b_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates the collection, processing, analysis, or charting of business or operational data, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub6.name: Design & Media Production

cat_sub24b_sub6.boundary: NOT document or presentation creation for business reporting. For slide decks, see 'Document & Presentation'.
cat_sub24b_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates tasks in visual design tools, video editors, 3D software, or digital audio workstations, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub7.name: Document & Presentation
cat_sub24b_sub7.description: Services that automate the creation, formatting, and management of documents, slides, and written reports.
cat_sub24b_sub7.boundary: NOT visual design or media editing. For graphic/video creation, see 'Design & Media Production'.
cat_sub24b_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates the generation or manipulation of text documents, spreadsheets, or presentation slides, classify here.

cat_sub24b_sub8.name: Communication & Collaboration
cat_sub24b_sub8.description: Services that automate messaging, email handling, meeting scheduling, and team collaboration platform interactions.
cat_sub24b_sub8.boundary: NOT marketing campaigns or customer support ticketing. For marketing emails, see 'Marketing & Content'.

cat_sub24b_sub9.name: Knowledge & Research

cat_sub24b_sub9.boundary: NOT task management or document creation. For managing to-do lists, see 'Project & Task Management'.

cat_sub26_sub1.name: Biomedical Literature & Data

cat_sub26_sub1.boundary: Focuses on document retrieval and data access for biomedical and health research. Includes specialized datasets like neuroimaging.
cat_sub26_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches/retrieves biomedical research articles, clinical data, neuroimaging datasets, or personal health metrics, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub10.name: Scientific Computing & Analysis

cat_sub26_sub10.boundary: Focuses on computational environments, mathematical processing, and analytical evaluation frameworks.

cat_sub26_sub12.name: Computer Vision & Image Analysis

cat_sub26_sub12.boundary: Focuses on image processing and analysis. Excludes 3D model generation and CAD design.

cat_sub27_sub18.boundary: Business directories, company databases, product intelligence, competitive intelligence platforms.

cat_sub27_sub22.name: Knowledge & Document Management
cat_sub27_sub22.description: Services for discovering and managing personal knowledge bases, documents, and note systems.
cat_sub27_sub22.boundary: Personal knowledge bases, document search, note systems, memory systems, personal information management.
cat_sub27_sub22.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches personal knowledge bases, documents, or note management systems, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub23.name: AI & LLM-Powered Search
cat_sub27_sub23.description: Services that use AI/LLMs to enhance search, retrieval, and analysis of information.
cat_sub27_sub23.boundary: LLM-powered querying, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), AI-enhanced search, semantic analysis for search.
cat_sub27_sub23.decision_rule: If the service primarily uses AI/LLM technology to power or enhance search, retrieval, or analysis workflows, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub24.name: Personal & Workflow Search
cat_sub27_sub24.description: Services for searching personal files, workflows, and specialized data science/analysis contexts.
cat_sub27_sub24.boundary: Local file search, workflow data discovery, data science tool integration, specialized analysis contexts.
cat_sub27_sub24.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches personal/local files or integrates search into specialized data/workflow contexts, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub3.name: Code & Technical Documentation
cat_sub27_sub3.description: Services for discovering source code repositories, software packages, API documentation, and developer resources.
cat_sub27_sub3.boundary: Source code, software libraries, package indices, technical/API docs, developer documentation.
cat_sub27_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for source code, software libraries, or official technical documentation, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub4.name: Financial & Market Data
cat_sub27_sub4.description: Services for finding stock prices, cryptocurrency data, financial filings, and economic indicators.
cat_sub27_sub4.boundary: Market data, financial securities, corporate filings, crypto data, economic indicators.
cat_sub27_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for real-time market data, financial securities, or corporate financial filings, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub5.name: Geospatial & Location Data
cat_sub27_sub5.description: Services for discovering places, points of interest, maps, and geographic datasets.
cat_sub27_sub5.boundary: Geographic locations, spatial data, points of interest, maps, location-based datasets.
cat_sub27_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for geographic locations, points of interest, or spatial datasets, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub7.name: Jobs & Professional Listings
cat_sub27_sub7.description: Services for discovering job postings, employment opportunities, and professional services.
cat_sub27_sub7.boundary: Job boards, employment listings, professional service directories, career opportunities.
cat_sub27_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches job boards, employment listings, or professional service directories, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub8.name: Travel, Events & Hospitality
cat_sub27_sub8.description: Services for finding flights, hotels, events, attractions, and travel-related information.
cat_sub27_sub8.boundary: Travel bookings, accommodations, event listings, tourist attractions, hospitality services.
cat_sub27_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for travel bookings, accommodations, or event listings, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub9.name: Books, Media & Entertainment
cat_sub27_sub9.description: Services for discovering books, movies, music, artwork, and entertainment content.
cat_sub27_sub9.boundary: Books, films, music, artwork, entertainment catalogs, media collections.
cat_sub27_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches catalogs of books, films, music, or entertainment content, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub1.name: Finance & Payments
cat_sub30_sub1.description: Services for banking, payments, accounting, trading, and financial data integration.
cat_sub30_sub1.boundary: Monetary transactions, accounts, financial markets, or accounting data.
cat_sub30_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles monetary transactions, accounts, financial markets, or accounting data, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub10.name: Marketing & Advertising
cat_sub30_sub10.description: Services for managing ad campaigns, marketing analytics, and customer engagement.
cat_sub30_sub10.boundary: Advertising, marketing campaigns, or marketing platform data.
cat_sub30_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages advertising, marketing campaigns, or marketing platform data, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub11.name: Communication & Messaging
cat_sub30_sub11.description: Services for email, chat, SMS, and real-time communication platforms.
cat_sub30_sub11.boundary: Sending/receiving messages, managing email, or interacting with chat platforms.
cat_sub30_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily sends/receives messages, manages email, or interacts with chat platforms, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub12.name: Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
cat_sub30_sub12.description: Services for managing cloud resources, infrastructure as code, and server provisioning.
cat_sub30_sub12.boundary: Cloud infrastructure, servers, resource provisioning, or infrastructure configuration.
cat_sub30_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provisions, configures, or manages cloud infrastructure or servers, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub13.name: Design & Creative Tools
cat_sub30_sub13.description: Services for interacting with design files, prototypes, and multimedia creation.
cat_sub30_sub13.boundary: Reading, modifying, or managing design files (UI/UX, CAD) or creative assets.
cat_sub30_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily reads, modifies, or manages design files or creative assets, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub14.name: Media & Entertainment
cat_sub30_sub14.description: Services for music streaming, video, gaming, and content publishing platforms.
cat_sub30_sub14.boundary: Access to music, video, games, or published articles/content.
cat_sub30_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to music, video, games, or published content, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub15.name: Blockchain & Cryptocurrency
cat_sub30_sub15.description: Services for interacting with blockchains, smart contracts, tokens, and crypto exchanges.
cat_sub30_sub15.boundary: Blockchain data, crypto transactions, or DeFi protocols.
cat_sub30_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily queries blockchain data, executes crypto transactions, or interacts with DeFi protocols, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub16.name: Internet of Things (IoT) & Hardware
cat_sub30_sub16.description: Services for controlling smart devices, sensors, industrial equipment, and hardware.
cat_sub30_sub16.boundary: Physical devices, sensors, or hardware automation.
cat_sub30_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily controls physical devices, sensors, or provides hardware automation, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub17.name: Human Resources (HR) & Operations
cat_sub30_sub17.description: Services for managing employees, schedules, approvals, and internal operations.
cat_sub30_sub17.boundary: Employee data, schedules, approvals, or internal operational workflows.
cat_sub30_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages employee data, schedules, approvals, or internal workflows, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub18.name: Networking & Infrastructure
cat_sub30_sub18.description: Services for network diagnostics, domain/IP lookups, time services, and content fetching.
cat_sub30_sub18.boundary: Network queries, domain/IP information, time services, or generic content retrieval.
cat_sub30_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides network diagnostics, WHOIS data, time services, or fetches web content, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub19.name: Security, Identity & Compliance
cat_sub30_sub19.description: Services for authentication, authorization, threat detection, compliance, and contracts.
cat_sub30_sub19.boundary: User authentication, access control, threat intelligence, compliance, contracts, or e-signatures.
cat_sub30_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles user authentication, authorization, threat detection, compliance, contracts, or e-signatures, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub2.name: Customer Relationship Management (CRM)
cat_sub30_sub2.description: Services for managing customer data, sales, marketing, and e-commerce platforms.
cat_sub30_sub2.boundary: Contacts, leads, companies, sales opportunities, or e-commerce storefronts/product catalogs.
cat_sub30_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages contacts, leads, companies, sales opportunities, or e-commerce storefronts/product catalogs, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub20.name: API & Integration Platforms
cat_sub30_sub20.description: Services that connect multiple applications or provide generic API integration capabilities.
cat_sub30_sub20.boundary: Multi-application connectors, API gateways, or integration platforms.
cat_sub30_sub20.decision_rule: If the service is explicitly a multi-application connector, API gateway, or integration platform (e.g., Zapier, Make), classify here. NOT for services that primarily provide other functionality.

cat_sub30_sub21.name: AI & Machine Learning Services
cat_sub30_sub21.description: Services for AI models, machine learning platforms, and intelligent automation.
cat_sub30_sub21.boundary: AI model interaction, ML platform access, or intelligent agents.
cat_sub30_sub21.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to AI models, ML training/inference platforms, or intelligent agents, classify here. NOT for services that merely use AI as a feature.

cat_sub30_sub3.name: Productivity & Collaboration
cat_sub30_sub3.description: Services for task management, note-taking, document collaboration, and team communication.
cat_sub30_sub3.boundary: General work tasks, notes, documents, team chat, or educational content.
cat_sub30_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages tasks, notes, documents, team chat for general work, or provides access to educational platform data, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub4.name: Project & Issue Management
cat_sub30_sub4.description: Services for tracking projects, tasks, bugs, and development workflows.
cat_sub30_sub4.boundary: Software projects, issues, tickets, or agile workflows.
cat_sub30_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages software projects, issues, tickets, or agile workflows, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub5.name: Code & Version Control
cat_sub30_sub5.description: Services for code repositories, code analysis, and developer collaboration.
cat_sub30_sub5.boundary: Software development, version control, code quality, or peer review.
cat_sub30_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily assists with software development, version control, code quality, or peer review, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub6.name: Build & Deployment Tools
cat_sub30_sub6.description: Services for CI/CD, testing, container management, and deployment pipelines.
cat_sub30_sub6.boundary: Build processes, testing, container orchestration, or deployment automation.
cat_sub30_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages build processes, testing, container orchestration, or deployment pipelines, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub7.name: Database & Data Warehouse
cat_sub30_sub7.description: Services for querying and managing structured data in databases and data warehouses.
cat_sub30_sub7.boundary: Direct SQL/natural language query access to relational, NoSQL, or analytical databases.
cat_sub30_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides direct query access to relational, NoSQL, or analytical databases, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8.name: Data Processing & ETL
cat_sub30_sub8.description: Services for data pipelines, ETL, data transformation, and unstructured data processing.
cat_sub30_sub8.boundary: Data movement, transformation, pipeline orchestration, or unstructured data search.
cat_sub30_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily moves, transforms, or processes data between systems (ETL), or searches unstructured data, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub9.name: Business Intelligence & Analytics
cat_sub30_sub9.description: Services for dashboards, data visualization, market research, and location intelligence.
cat_sub30_sub9.boundary: Dashboards, reports, market sizing, business analysis, or geolocation/mapping data.
cat_sub30_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides dashboards, reports, market analysis, or geolocation/mapping/route data, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub1.name: Video Content Services
cat_sub4_sub1.description: Services for creating, editing, managing, analyzing, or distributing video content, including clips, films, and live streams.
cat_sub4_sub1.boundary: NOT for services primarily focused on audio-only content (Music & Audio), static images (Image Content), 3D models (3D & Interactive Media), or text-based content (Text & Publishing).
cat_sub4_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, edits, manages, streams, or analyzes video content, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub10.name: Social & UGC Content
cat_sub4_sub10.description: Services for accessing, managing, or analyzing user-generated content from social media and content platforms.
cat_sub4_sub10.boundary: NOT for services that create the content itself (e.g., video/image generation) or manage professional media libraries.
cat_sub4_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with user-generated posts, videos, or profiles on social/content platforms (e.g., YouTube, Bilibili, Red), classify here.

cat_sub4_sub11.name: Media Library Management
cat_sub4_sub11.description: Services for organizing, managing, and automating personal or professional collections of media files (video, audio, books).
cat_sub4_sub11.boundary: NOT for services that create/edit media or access social platform content (Social & UGC Content).
cat_sub4_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps organize, catalog, or automate the management of a personal media library, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub12.name: Digital Audio Workstations
cat_sub4_sub12.description: Services that provide control, interaction, or project management for professional audio/music production software.
cat_sub4_sub12.boundary: NOT for general music playback services (Music & Audio Services) or for generating music via AI (Multi-format AI Media Generation).
cat_sub4_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily controls or interacts with a professional Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) application, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub15.name: Board & Strategy Games
cat_sub4_sub15.description: Services for playing, analyzing, or interfacing with AI engines for board games, card games, and puzzles.
cat_sub4_sub15.boundary: NOT for video game data (Game Data & Analytics) or video game development (Game Development).
cat_sub4_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides an engine, analysis, or interface for board games, chess, or puzzles, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub16.name: Multi-format AI Media Generation
cat_sub4_sub16.description: Services that use AI to generate multiple types of media (image, video, audio, 3D) from a single platform or prompt.
cat_sub4_sub16.boundary: NOT for services that generate only one specific media type (e.g., only images) or that are not AI-driven.
cat_sub4_sub16.decision_rule: If the service is an AI platform that can generate more than one primary media type (image, video, audio, 3D), classify here.

cat_sub4_sub17.name: Media Asset Storage & Delivery
cat_sub4_sub17.description: Services focused on uploading, storing, retrieving, and delivering media files (images, video) via the cloud.
cat_sub4_sub17.boundary: NOT for services that create/edit the media content itself or manage personal libraries (Media Library Management).
cat_sub4_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides cloud storage, upload, CDN, or delivery for media files, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub18.name: Text & Publishing
cat_sub4_sub18.description: Services for managing, summarizing, or interacting with text-based entertainment content like books, blogs, and puzzles.
cat_sub4_sub18.boundary: NOT for services handling audiobooks (Music & Audio Services) or video content derived from text.
cat_sub4_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages, summarizes, or provides interactive access to books, blogs, or text-based puzzles, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub2.name: Music & Audio Services
cat_sub4_sub2.description: Services for music playback, audio production, sound synthesis, voice generation, podcast management, and other audio-focused content.
cat_sub4_sub2.boundary: NOT for services focused on video (Video Content Services), images (Image Content), or text-to-speech purely for video dubbing (belongs in Video).
cat_sub4_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles music, soundtracks, voiceovers, podcasts, or audio production/playback, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub3.name: Image Content Services
cat_sub4_sub3.description: Services for generating, editing, analyzing, or sourcing static images, photographs, illustrations, and memes.
cat_sub4_sub3.boundary: NOT for services that generate or edit video (Video Content Services) or 3D models (3D & Interactive Media).
cat_sub4_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, edits, sources, or analyzes static 2D images, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub4.name: 3D & Interactive Media
cat_sub4_sub4.description: Services for creating, editing, or interacting with 3D models, scenes, animations, and interactive 3D applications/games.
cat_sub4_sub4.boundary: NOT for services focused on 2D images (Image Content), standard video (Video Content Services), or non-interactive media.
cat_sub4_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, manipulates, or provides an interface for 3D models, animations, or interactive 3D environments, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub5.name: Game Data & Analytics
cat_sub4_sub5.description: Services that provide player data, match history, statistics, and analytical insights for video games and esports.
cat_sub4_sub5.boundary: NOT for services that are game development tools (Game Development) or that stream/play games (belongs in broader entertainment, but not a defined sub-category here).
cat_sub4_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to in-game player data, match results, or game-specific statistics, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub6.name: Game Development
cat_sub4_sub6.description: Services that function as tools or assistants for developing, scripting, testing, or building video games.
cat_sub4_sub6.boundary: NOT for services that only provide game data (Game Data & Analytics) or that are the playable game itself.
cat_sub4_sub6.decision_rule: If the service is primarily a tool, plugin, or assistant used in the process of creating or coding a video game, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub7.name: Sports Data & Fantasy
cat_sub4_sub7.description: Services providing real-time scores, match data, player statistics, and fantasy league information for physical sports.
cat_sub4_sub7.boundary: NOT for esports data (Game Data & Analytics) or general event ticketing (Events & Ticketing).
cat_sub4_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data, statistics, or fantasy management for real-world sports (e.g., soccer, basketball), classify here.

cat_sub4_sub8.name: Film & TV Database
cat_sub4_sub8.description: Services for searching, querying, and getting recommendations for movies, TV shows, and related metadata.
cat_sub4_sub8.boundary: NOT for services that stream or edit video content (Video Content Services) or manage personal media libraries (Media Library Management).
cat_sub4_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a database for discovering film/TV titles, cast, crew, and recommendations, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub1.name: Email & Calendar Services
cat_sub7_sub1.description: Services for sending, receiving, and managing email communications and calendar scheduling.
cat_sub7_sub1.boundary: Core email functionality (SMTP, IMAP, provider APIs) and calendar/scheduling features. Excludes multi-channel platforms that include email as one feature.
cat_sub7_sub1.decision_rule: If the service's primary purpose is email management OR calendar/scheduling, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub2.name: Instant Messaging Platform APIs
cat_sub7_sub2.description: APIs for interacting with specific messaging platforms like Slack, WhatsApp, or Telegram.
cat_sub7_sub2.boundary: Direct integration with named messaging apps' official APIs. Includes bots, channels, and message automation for specific platforms.
cat_sub7_sub2.decision_rule: If the service connects to a named messaging app's official API for sending/receiving messages, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub4.name: Real-time Communication & IoT SDKs
cat_sub7_sub4.description: SDKs/APIs for embedding custom voice, video, text chat, or device communication into applications.
cat_sub7_sub4.boundary: Generic building blocks for real-time audio, video, text features, or IoT device communication. Excludes platform-specific integrations.
cat_sub7_sub4.decision_rule: If the service provides underlying technology for building custom communication features OR communicating with physical devices, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub5.name: Voice & Video Call Services
cat_sub7_sub5.description: Services for making, receiving, and managing voice or video calls and conferences.
cat_sub7_sub5.boundary: Initiating or managing interactive voice/video sessions between parties. Includes meeting platforms and call management systems.
cat_sub7_sub5.decision_rule: If the service's primary purpose is managing interactive voice or video calls/meetings, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub6.name: Push Notification Services
cat_sub7_sub6.description: Services for sending alerts to user devices via platform-specific push channels.
cat_sub7_sub6.boundary: One-way delivery of notifications to device lock screens or notification centers. Excludes multi-channel platforms that include push as one feature.
cat_sub7_sub6.decision_rule: If the service's primary purpose is sending push notifications to mobile/desktop devices, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub1.name: Version Control Services
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub1.description: Services for managing source code versioning, repositories, branches, commits, and collaboration workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub1.boundary: Focuses on Git operations, repository management, and version control workflows. Excludes file management without versioning.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables version control operations (commit, branch, pull request) or manages repositories, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub10.name: Documentation & Knowledge
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub10.description: Services for generating, managing, or searching technical documentation and developer knowledge bases.
