cat_sub23a_sub1_sub10.boundary: Handles documentation creation, retrieval, and management. Excludes code analysis and API testing.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the creation, retrieval, or management of documentation or code knowledge, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub11.name: Terminal & Shell Operations
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub11.description: Services that enable execution of shell commands, terminal emulation, and command-line interaction.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub11.boundary: Provides direct command-line/shell access and control. Excludes IDE integrations and file management GUIs.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides an interface to execute terminal/shell commands or scripts, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub12.name: File System Operations
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub12.description: Services for navigating, reading, writing, and managing files and directories within filesystems.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub12.boundary: Enables raw file/directory manipulation. Excludes version control operations and database management.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables reading, writing, or managing files and directories, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub13.name: Project Scaffolding
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub13.description: Services for generating project structures, boilerplate code, and initial configurations for frameworks.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub13.boundary: Creates initial project/component structures. Excludes ongoing development and code generation.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates new projects, templates, or starter code from a configuration, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub14.name: Code Generation & Conversion
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub14.description: Services that automatically generate code, convert between languages, or transpile code between forms.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub14.boundary: Transforms or generates source code. Excludes project scaffolding and code execution.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily generates new code or converts existing code between languages/formats, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub15.name: Testing & Quality Analysis
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub15.description: Services for running tests, analyzing code quality, calculating metrics, and ensuring coding standards.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub15.boundary: Handles functional testing and code quality checks. Excludes security scanning and runtime debugging.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily executes tests or analyzes code for quality/standards (linting, coverage), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub16.name: Package & Dependency Management
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub16.description: Services for managing software packages, dependencies, system configurations, and runtime environments.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub16.boundary: Focuses on package management, dependency resolution, and system configuration. Excludes build tools and deployment.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages software packages, dependencies, or system configurations (like NixOS), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub17.name: UI/Component Development
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub17.description: Services for designing, generating, or interacting with user interface components, layouts, and visual assets.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub17.boundary: Specifically for UI/frontend component work. Excludes general code generation and backend integration.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily assists in creating or managing UI components, designs, or visual elements, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub18.name: Specialized Hardware & IoT
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub18.description: Services for developing, debugging, or interacting with specialized hardware, microcontrollers, or IoT devices.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub18.boundary: Enables hardware-specific coding and control. Excludes general software development and cloud APIs.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables coding for or interaction with physical hardware/IoT devices, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub19.name: Game & Interactive Development
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub19.description: Services for game development, interactive applications, engine integration, and game logic scripting.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub19.boundary: Specifically for game engines, interactive frameworks, and game-specific workflows. Excludes general UI development.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with or assists development for game engines or interactive frameworks, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub2.name: Code Execution & Sandbox
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub2.description: Services that provide isolated environments to run, test, or debug code in various languages securely.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub2.boundary: Provides secure execution environments for code snippets or programs. Excludes build systems and deployment pipelines.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a secure environment to execute code snippets or programs, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub20.name: Collaboration & Workflow
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub20.description: Services that manage developer collaboration, issue tracking, task management, and team-based workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub20.boundary: Handles project management and team coordination around code. Excludes version control and documentation.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages issues, tasks, sprints, or team coordination within development, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub3.name: Development Environment Integration
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub3.description: Services that connect tools to IDEs, editors, or development environments including MCP server management.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub3.boundary: Enhances IDE/editor functionality or manages development tool ecosystems. Excludes standalone tools without IDE integration.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with IDEs/editors or manages development tool ecosystems (like MCP servers), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub4.name: Code Analysis & Navigation
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub4.description: Services for statically analyzing code structure, finding symbols, tracking dependencies, and semantic search.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub4.boundary: Analyzes code structure and relationships without executing it. Excludes runtime debugging and security scanning.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes code to provide insights into its structure, relationships, or symbols, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub5.name: Database & Data Management
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub5.description: Services for interacting with databases, managing schemas, executing queries, and handling data models.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub5.boundary: Focuses on database-specific operations (SQL/NoSQL) and data schemas. Excludes general file operations.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables operations on databases or data schemas, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub6.name: API & Service Integration
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub6.description: Services that facilitate interaction with external APIs, SDKs, or web services including testing and management.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub6.boundary: Connects to and manages external services/APIs. Excludes database operations and internal service communication.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables interaction with or management of external APIs or web services, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub7.name: Build & Deployment Tools
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub7.description: Services for building projects, managing dependencies, configuring environments, and deploying applications.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub7.boundary: Handles build processes, dependency management, and deployment pipelines. Excludes code execution sandboxes.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles building software, managing dependencies, or deploying applications, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub8.name: Debugging & Profiling
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub8.description: Services for debugging running applications, profiling performance, inspecting memory, and tracing execution.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub8.boundary: Provides runtime inspection and debugging tools. Excludes static analysis and pre-execution testing.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides tools for debugging, profiling, or tracing live applications, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub1_sub9.name: Code Security & Scanning
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub9.description: Services focused on identifying security vulnerabilities, scanning for secrets, and analyzing security risks.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub9.boundary: Specifically for security-focused scanning and vulnerability detection. Excludes general quality analysis.
cat_sub23a_sub1_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily scans code or dependencies for security vulnerabilities or exposed credentials, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub10.name: Model & Experiment Management
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub10.description: Services for tracking ML experiments, managing model registries, and hyperparameter optimization.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub10.boundary: Focus on tracking, comparing, searching, or managing machine learning models and experiments.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily tracks, compares, searches, or manages ML models and experiments, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub11.name: Cloud & Infrastructure Management
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub11.description: Services for provisioning, interacting with, and optimizing cloud resources and databases.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub11.boundary: Focus on provisioning, configuring, or managing cloud infrastructure, databases, or compute resources.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provisions, configures, or manages cloud infrastructure or compute resources, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub12.name: Security, Compliance & Observability
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub12.description: Services for security scanning, compliance auditing, and monitoring AI agent performance.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub12.boundary: Focus on security vulnerabilities, compliance, and telemetry/tracing for AI agents.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily identifies security vulnerabilities, ensures compliance, or provides telemetry for AI agents, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub14.name: Reasoning, Cognitive & Numerical Computing
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub14.description: Services for AI reasoning frameworks, constraint solving, and scientific calculations.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub14.boundary: Focus on enhancing AI reasoning/planning and performing mathematical/scientific computation.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides AI reasoning frameworks or performs mathematical/scientific computation, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub15.name: API & Protocol Integration
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub15.description: Services for connecting to and interacting with external APIs and specific protocols.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub15.boundary: Focus on providing a bridge for an AI to interact with specific external APIs or protocols.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a bridge for an AI to interact with an external API or protocol, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub16.name: MCP Server Development & Tooling
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub16.description: Services for building, discovering, and managing MCP servers and related developer tooling.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub16.boundary: Focus on developing, managing, scanning, or registering MCP servers and core protocol tooling.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily develops, manages, or provides tooling for MCP servers/protocol, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub17.name: MCP Resource Servers & Utilities
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub17.description: MCP servers that provide domain-specific resources, prompts, tools, and foundational models.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub17.boundary: Focus on MCP servers that offer ready-to-use resources, tools, prompts, or model endpoints.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub17.decision_rule: If the service is an MCP server that provides domain-specific resources, tools, prompts, or model endpoints, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub19.name: Foundational AI Models & Inference
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub19.description: Services providing access to, or interfaces for, core AI/ML models and inference APIs.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub19.boundary: Focus on model inference APIs, language model endpoints, and core AI model capabilities.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to or an interface for core AI/ML model inference, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub20.name: Data & System Integration
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub20.description: Services for connecting to diverse data sources, social platforms, and internal systems.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub20.boundary: Focus on bridging AI to social media, internal databases, CRM, ERP, and other data systems.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects an AI to diverse data sources or internal business systems, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub3.name: Software & Game Development
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub3.description: Services for code analysis, game development, CAD generation, and development tool integration.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub3.boundary: Focus on writing, analyzing, or generating code, assets, or logic for software/games.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily assists in writing, analyzing, or generating code, assets, or logic for software/games, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub4.name: Media & Content Generation
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub4.description: Services for generating and editing images, videos, 3D content, and audio.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub4.boundary: Focus on creating, editing, or synthesizing visual, audio, or video media content.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, edits, or synthesizes visual, audio, or video media content, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub5.name: Document & Knowledge Processing
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub5.description: Services for analyzing, querying documents, and implementing RAG systems.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub5.boundary: Focus on processing, retrieving from, or analyzing structured/unstructured documents/knowledge bases.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily processes, retrieves from, or analyzes documents/knowledge bases, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub6.name: Data Science & Analytics
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub6.description: Services for data analysis, visualization, and connecting to data science platforms.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub6.boundary: Focus on exploratory data analysis, statistical computation, and broad data science platforms.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs exploratory data analysis, statistical computation, or connects to broad data science platforms, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub7.name: Computer Vision & Image Analysis
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub7.description: Services for image recognition, object detection, and general computer vision tasks.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub7.boundary: Focus on analyzing, interpreting, or modifying visual content (images, video frames).
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes, interprets, or modifies visual content, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub8.name: Search & Information Retrieval
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub8.description: Services for semantic search, vector retrieval, web scraping, and information discovery.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub8.boundary: Focus on finding, indexing, or retrieving information from large corpora or the web.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds, indexes, or retrieves information from large corpora or the web, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub13_sub9.name: AI Agent & Workflow Orchestration
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub9.description: Services for managing, evaluating, and orchestrating multi-agent systems and workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub9.boundary: Focus on coordinating, evaluating, or managing the lifecycle of autonomous AI agents or workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub13_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily coordinates, evaluates, or manages autonomous AI agents or workflows, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub1.name: Blockchain, Cryptocurrency & Finance
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub1.description: Services for blockchain networks, cryptocurrencies, financial data, trading, and economic analytics.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub1.boundary: Blockchain protocols, crypto assets, financial markets, trading platforms, economic data. Excludes traditional banking APIs.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to blockchain networks, handles crypto assets, or provides financial market/trading data, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub10.name: Database, Data Systems & Legacy Sources
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub10.description: Services for querying, managing, and analyzing structured data in databases, warehouses, and legacy systems.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub10.boundary: SQL/NoSQL databases, data warehouses, graph systems, OLAP, proprietary/legacy enterprise data sources. Excludes file storage and search engines.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to databases, data warehouses, or proprietary/legacy systems for data operations, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub11.name: Search & Retrieval
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub11.description: Services for semantic, full-text, or vector-based search over document collections and datasets.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub11.boundary: Vector search, full-text search, document retrieval. Excludes database querying and graph traversals.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides search capabilities over documents or data, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub13.name: File & Object Storage
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub13.description: Services for accessing, managing, and converting files and objects in cloud storage.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub13.boundary: Cloud storage (S3, IPFS), document format conversion (PDF, Excel). Excludes database systems and web content extraction.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with file/object storage or converts document formats, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub14.name: Data Pipeline & Orchestration
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub14.description: Services for building, managing, and monitoring data pipelines, ETL/ELT workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub14.boundary: Pipeline orchestration, workflow management, ETL/ELT tools. Excludes direct database querying and general task automation.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps build or orchestrate data pipelines, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub15.name: API Gateway, Protocol Translation & Network Access
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub15.description: Services that bridge API protocols, translate standards, or provide low-level network access.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub15.boundary: Protocol translation (gRPC to MCP), API gateways, raw network/socket communication. Excludes services that use APIs without translation.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub15.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to translate/gateway between API protocols or provide raw network access, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub16.name: Developer & DevOps Tools
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub16.description: Services for software development, deployment, observability, infrastructure, and security.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub16.boundary: CI/CD, observability, security scanning, compliance platforms. Excludes project management and code repositories.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to development, deployment, observability, or security platforms, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub18.name: MCP Infrastructure & Management
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub18.description: Services that provide core infrastructure for the MCP ecosystem.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub18.boundary: Server discovery, registration, management, MCP registries/gateways. Excludes domain-specific MCP servers.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages the MCP ecosystem itself, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub19.name: Multi-Agent & Tool Orchestration
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub19.description: Services that coordinate AI agents, discover/call tools, or manage multi-tool workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub19.boundary: Agent coordination, dynamic tool discovery/routing, workflow orchestration. Excludes single-tool MCP servers.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily orchestrates multiple agents/tools or provides dynamic tool discovery, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub23.name: Audio, Speech & Interactive Media
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub23.description: Services for text-to-speech, speech-to-text, audio generation, and game/simulation interaction.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub23.boundary: Audio processing, voice interaction, game engines, simulation platforms. Excludes general communication platforms.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub23.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides audio/speech capabilities or connects to game/simulation systems, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub25.name: Scientific, Public & Government Data
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub25.description: Services for accessing scientific datasets, government/public data, and healthcare systems.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub25.boundary: Scientific databases, public data APIs (NASA, Wikipedia), healthcare systems (FHIR). Excludes private commercial APIs.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub25.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to scientific resources, public data APIs, or healthcare systems, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub26.name: Data Format Conversion & Transformation
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub26.description: Services for converting data between formats, schemas, or structures.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub26.boundary: JSON to CSV, data serialization, format transformation. Excludes document format conversion (PDF/Excel) and ETL pipelines.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub26.decision_rule: If the service primarily converts data between different formats or structures, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub27.name: AI & Machine Learning Model Integration
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub27.description: Services for integrating, serving, and interacting with AI/ML models and capabilities.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub27.boundary: Model serving, computer vision, NLP models, AI capabilities. Excludes vector search and general AI agent orchestration.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub27.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to or integration with AI/ML models, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub4.name: Productivity, Collaboration & Work Management
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub4.description: Services for office suites, document collaboration, note-taking, task and project management.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub4.boundary: Office suites, collaborative docs, note-taking apps, design tools, project/issue tracking. Excludes code repository management.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to productivity, collaboration, or project management tools, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub14_sub8.name: Web Automation, Scraping & Communication
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub8.description: Services for automating web interactions, extracting web content, and messaging/social platforms.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub8.boundary: Browser automation, web scraping, messaging apps, social platforms. Excludes email in office suites and API-based data access.
cat_sub23a_sub14_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates web browsers, extracts web content, or connects to messaging/social platforms, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub1.name: Software Development
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub1.description: AI assistants for coding, debugging, version control, project generation, and IDE integration.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub1.boundary: Focuses on the software development lifecycle: writing, analyzing, managing, or executing code.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily assists with writing, analyzing, managing, or executing software code and development workflows, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub10.name: Productivity & Desktop
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub10.description: AI assistants for automating local desktop applications, file systems, calendars, and personal workflow tasks.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub10.boundary: Focuses on the user's local desktop environment and personal productivity apps.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates tasks within a user's local desktop environment or personal productivity apps, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub11.name: Security & Identity
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub11.description: AI assistants for code scanning, security analysis, authentication, authorization, and audit logging.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub11.boundary: Focuses on security analysis, access control, and identity verification.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs security analysis, access control, or identity verification, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub12.name: Web & Browser
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub12.description: AI assistants for web scraping, browser automation, web testing, and interacting with web pages.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub12.boundary: Focuses on controlling a web browser or automating interactions with websites.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily controls a web browser or automates interactions with websites, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub13.name: AI & Model Orchestration
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub13.description: AI assistants that manage, connect to, or orchestrate other AI models, LLMs, and multi-agent workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub13.boundary: Focuses on the coordination, routing, or chaining of multiple AI models/agents for complex tasks.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub13.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to connect to, manage, or coordinate between multiple AI models/agents for task execution, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub14.name: MCP & Protocol Management
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub14.description: Services for the discovery, management, and infrastructure of the MCP protocol and its servers.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub14.boundary: Focuses on the MCP ecosystem itself: registries, gateways, server management tools.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides tools, directories, or infrastructure for managing the MCP ecosystem, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub15.name: Testing & Quality Assurance
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub15.description: AI assistants for automated testing, debugging, quality analysis, and performance monitoring.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub15.boundary: Focuses on post-development testing, quality analysis, and error monitoring.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily executes tests, analyzes application quality, or monitors for errors post-development, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub18.name: General AI Services
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub18.description: Services providing foundational access to AI models/LLMs without specific functional orchestration.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub18.boundary: Focuses on core AI/LLM API access, chat completion, and basic model interaction.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides simple API or chat-based access to an AI model/LLM for general use, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub2.name: System & Infrastructure
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub2.description: AI assistants for managing OS, cloud, containers, VMs, servers, and physical hardware/IoT.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub2.boundary: Focuses on compute, storage, networking, platform infrastructure, and physical device control.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages infrastructure or issues commands to physical hardware/IoT devices, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub3.name: Data & Analytics
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub3.description: AI assistants for querying databases, performing data analysis, generating visualizations.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub3.boundary: Focuses on interacting with, querying, analyzing, or visualizing structured data.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with, queries, analyzes, or visualizes structured data, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub4.name: Design & Multimedia
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub4.description: AI assistants for graphic design, 3D modeling, video, image editing, and game/simulation assets.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub4.boundary: Focuses on creating or manipulating visual, audio, video assets, and game/simulation content.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates or manipulates multimedia assets or game/simulation content, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub5.name: Content & Documentation
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub5.description: AI assistants for writing, managing documents, wikis, knowledge bases, and educational content.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub5.boundary: Focuses on the creation, management, or retrieval of textual knowledge, docs, and learning materials.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles textual knowledge, documentation, or educational content, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub6.name: Business Operations
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub6.description: AI assistants for project management, CRM, support, marketing, finance, and e-commerce.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub6.boundary: Focuses on internal business processes, customer interaction, and financial/commerce workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates business processes, project tracking, customer interaction, or financial transactions, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub2_sub8.name: Communication & Social
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub8.description: AI assistants for email, messaging, social media, voice platforms, and real-time communication.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub8.boundary: Focuses on channels for human-to-human or human-to-AI communication.
cat_sub23a_sub2_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages or integrates with communication channels, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub1.name: Continuous Integration & Delivery
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub1.description: Services for automating build, test, and deployment pipelines. Includes CI server management, pipeline orchestration, and deployment automation.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub1.boundary: Not infrastructure provisioning (see Infrastructure as Code) or runtime management (see Container & Orchestration).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates software build, test, or deployment pipelines, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub10.name: Artifact & Dependency Management
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub10.description: Services for managing build artifacts, software packages, dependencies, and repositories (e.g., JFrog, Maven Central, npm).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub10.boundary: Not source code management (see Source & Version Control) or container image registries (see Container & Orchestration).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages software packages, dependencies, or build artifacts, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub13.name: Development Environment
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub13.description: Services for provisioning, configuring, and managing development environments, containers, and local tooling.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub13.boundary: Not production infrastructure (see Infrastructure as Code) or CI/CD pipelines (see Continuous Integration & Delivery).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily sets up or manages local or containerized development environments, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub14.name: Remote Execution & Sandbox
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub14.description: Services for securely executing code, commands, or scripts in isolated, sandboxed environments, often for AI-generated code.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub14.boundary: Not production deployment (see Serverless & PaaS or Container & Orchestration) or local development (see Development Environment).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a secure, isolated environment for executing untrusted code or commands, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub16.name: Workflow & Process Automation
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub16.description: Services for orchestrating and automating complex, multi-step business or DevOps workflows across different tools.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub16.boundary: Not single-step CI/CD pipelines (see Continuous Integration & Delivery) or infrastructure provisioning.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily orchestrates multi-step processes or automates workflows across disparate systems, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub17.name: MCP Server Management
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub17.description: Services specifically for installing, managing, hosting, and securing MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers themselves.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub17.boundary: Not using MCP servers to perform other DevOps tasks. This is meta-management of the MCP tooling layer.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily installs, hosts, secures, or manages other MCP servers as a platform, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub18.name: Desktop & Remote Access
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub18.description: Services for automating and managing local desktop environments, remote machines, and SSH connections for administrative tasks.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub18.boundary: Not cloud resource management (see Cloud Resource Management) or container orchestration.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates tasks on a local desktop OS or manages remote machines via SSH/RDP, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub19.name: Mobile DevOps
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub19.description: Services for building, testing, deploying, and managing mobile applications (iOS/Android), including simulators and device farms.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub19.boundary: Not web or backend service deployment. Specific to mobile app lifecycle.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles tasks related to mobile application build, test, or deployment pipelines, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub2.name: Infrastructure as Code
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub2.description: Services for provisioning and managing infrastructure using declarative code. Includes Terraform integrations and cloud resource templating.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub2.boundary: Not CI/CD pipeline execution (see Continuous Integration & Delivery) or direct cloud API calls (see Cloud Resource Management).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily uses code to define and provision infrastructure resources, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub20.name: Legacy & On-Prem System Management
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub20.description: Services for managing legacy systems, on-premise infrastructure, virtual machines, and mainframe-style deployments.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub20.boundary: Not cloud-native or containerized infrastructure management.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages traditional VMs, on-premise servers, or legacy system deployments, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub3.name: Container & Orchestration
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub3.description: Services for managing containers, container images, and orchestration platforms like Docker and Kubernetes.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub3.boundary: Not infrastructure provisioning (see Infrastructure as Code) or serverless deployments (see Serverless & PaaS).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages containers, container images, or container orchestrators, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub4.name: Cloud Resource Management
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub4.description: Services for direct operational management of cloud resources (VMs, databases, serverless functions) via cloud provider APIs.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub4.boundary: Not infrastructure defined as code (see Infrastructure as Code) or application-level monitoring (see Observability & Monitoring).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs direct operations on cloud provider resources (AWS, GCP, Azure, etc.), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub5.name: Serverless & PaaS
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub5.description: Services for deploying and managing applications on serverless platforms and Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) environments.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub5.boundary: Not container-based deployments (see Container & Orchestration) or traditional VM management (see Cloud Resource Management).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily deploys or manages applications on abstracted, scale-to-zero platforms (Cloud Run, Heroku, Netlify), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub6.name: Feature Flag Management
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub6.description: Services for creating, managing, and toggling feature flags and configuration for controlled rollouts and experimentation.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub6.boundary: Not general application configuration or secret management.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages feature flags or controlled release toggles, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub7.name: Observability & Monitoring
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub7.description: Services for collecting and querying logs, metrics, traces, and events to monitor application and system health.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub7.boundary: Not infrastructure provisioning (see Infrastructure as Code) or security scanning (see Security & Compliance).
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily queries or aggregates logs, metrics, or traces for system insight, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub8.name: Security & Compliance
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub8.description: Services for vulnerability scanning, secret management, security policy enforcement, and compliance checks within the deployment lifecycle.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub8.boundary: Not general system monitoring (see Observability & Monitoring) or network security configuration.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs security scanning, vulnerability assessment, or compliance validation, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub21_sub9.name: Database Operations
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub9.description: Services for database provisioning, schema management, query execution, and operational tasks across different database systems.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub9.boundary: Not application data logic or business intelligence/analytics.
cat_sub23a_sub21_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs operational tasks (query, schema change, provisioning) on databases, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub1.name: API & Protocol Documentation
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub1.description: Services providing structured access to official API specifications, SDK documentation, and protocol definitions (e.g., OpenAPI, JSON-RPC).
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub1.boundary: Not for general developer forums, community lists, or tools that manage project-specific knowledge. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides programmatic access to API/SDK specifications or protocol documentation, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub11.name: Community Server Lists
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub11.description: Services that aggregate, list, or provide directories of community-built servers, tools, or resources within a specific ecosystem.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub11.boundary: Not for tools that install/manage servers, or platforms for discussing them. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub11.decision_rule: If the service is primarily a curated list or directory pointing to community resources (like MCP servers), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub13.name: Community Discussion Hubs
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub13.description: Services that provide access to or are gateways for real-time, interactive discussion platforms (e.g., Discord, Reddit).
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub13.boundary: Not for Q&A archives, resource lists, or documentation. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to or represents a real-time chat or forum community for discussion, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub14.name: Tool & Resource Installers
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub14.description: Services that facilitate the installation, configuration, or setup of other developer tools, servers, or resources within an environment.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub14.boundary: Not for the tools/resources themselves, or for discovery platforms. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub14.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to install or configure other tools/servers within a developer's workspace, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub15.name: Prompt & Template Repositories
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub15.description: Services that provide access to collections of prompts, configuration templates, or reusable workflow definitions.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub15.boundary: Not for tools that execute prompts or manage projects. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a library or repository of reusable prompts, templates, or configuration snippets, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub2.name: Framework & Platform Docs
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub2.description: Services enabling AI/agents to query official documentation, guides, and best practices for specific software frameworks, libraries, or platforms.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub2.boundary: Not for API specifications, community-curated lists, or project-specific knowledge bases. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides search/query access to the official documentation of a specific development framework or platform, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub3.name: Component Library & UI Docs
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub3.description: Services that facilitate interaction with and querying of UI component libraries, design systems, and their associated documentation.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub3.boundary: Not for general platform/framework documentation or API specifications. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables discovery, testing, or querying of UI component libraries and their documentation, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub4.name: Developer Knowledge Bases
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub4.description: Services providing access to structured, project-specific technical knowledge bases, wikis, and internal documentation systems.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub4.boundary: Not for public API docs, community forums, or code repositories. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides query access to a project's or organization's internal technical wiki or knowledge base, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub22_sub7.name: Database & Graph Interaction
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub7.description: Services that enable AI agents to interact with and query databases (especially graph databases) and their schemas.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub7.boundary: Not for documentation query services or API specification explorers. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23a_sub22_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides an interface for an AI to query or explore the schema/data within a specific database system, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub1.name: Task & Project Management
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub1.description: Services for creating, tracking, and managing tasks, projects, and workflows. Includes issue tracking and project planning.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub1.boundary: Excludes calendar scheduling, note-taking, and document collaboration. For scheduling, see 'Calendar & Scheduling'. For notes, see 'Note & Knowledge Management'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages to-do items, project issues, or work backlogs, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub10.name: Terminal & CLI Management
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub10.description: Services for managing local command-line interfaces, terminal sessions, and executing shell commands.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub10.boundary: Excludes remote server access and desktop GUI automation. For remote access, see 'Remote Access & SSH'. For GUI control, see 'Desktop & OS Automation'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages local terminal sessions or executes command-line instructions, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub11.name: Code & Repository Management
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub11.description: Services for managing source code, version control (e.g., Git), and software development repositories.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub11.boundary: Excludes project task management and build/CI automation. For project issues, see 'Task & Project Management'. For build fixes, see 'Development & DevOps Automation'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with source code repositories or version control systems, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub12.name: Development & DevOps Automation
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub12.description: Services for automating software development workflows, including build processes, testing, and deployment.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub12.boundary: Excludes source code management and project planning. For repositories, see 'Code & Repository Management'. For project tasks, see 'Task & Project Management'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates build, test, or deployment pipelines in a software development context, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub13.name: Communication & Messaging
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub13.description: Services for sending, receiving, and managing messages through platforms like email, chat, or voice.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub13.boundary: Excludes calendar scheduling and task collaboration. For scheduling, see 'Calendar & Scheduling'. For task collaboration, see 'Task & Project Management'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the sending or management of interpersonal messages (email, chat, voice memos), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub14.name: Presentation & Slide Generation
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub14.description: Services for creating, editing, and managing presentation slides and visual decks.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub14.boundary: Excludes general document conversion and document collaboration. For document conversion, see 'Document Processing & Conversion'. For collaborative docs, see 'Document Collaboration'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates or manipulates presentation slides (e.g., PowerPoint, Google Slides), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub15.name: Screenshot & Visual Capture
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub15.description: Services for capturing screenshots of web pages, applications, or screens for documentation or analysis.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub15.boundary: Excludes optical character recognition and browser automation. For text extraction from images, see 'Content Extraction & OCR'. For browser interaction, see 'Browser Automation & Scraping'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily captures static images or screenshots of user interfaces, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub16.name: Data Format Transformation
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub16.description: Services for converting and transforming structured data between formats like JSON, CSV, and Excel.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub16.boundary: Excludes document format conversion and content extraction. For documents (PDF, DOCX), see 'Document Processing & Conversion'. For text extraction, see 'Content Extraction & OCR'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily transforms structured data formats (JSON/CSV/Excel), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub17.name: Workflow & Process Automation
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub17.description: Services for designing, orchestrating, and executing multi-step automated workflows across different tools.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub17.boundary: Excludes single-domain task management and simple script execution. For task lists, see 'Task & Project Management'. For local scripts, see 'Desktop & OS Automation'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily coordinates or executes sequences of actions across multiple applications or services, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub18.name: Utility & Tool Aggregation
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub18.description: Services that aggregate or provide access to a collection of small, general-purpose productivity utilities.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub18.boundary: Excludes specialized tools for a single functional domain (e.g., only document conversion). For domain-specific tools, see their respective categories.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a bundled set of diverse, small-scale utilities (e.g., password generator, IP lookup), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub19.name: MCP Server Management
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub19.description: Services for managing, configuring, and discovering Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and tools.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub19.boundary: Excludes the actual productivity tools served by MCP. For the tools themselves, see other functional categories.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages the lifecycle, configuration, or discovery of MCP servers, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub2.name: Calendar & Scheduling
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub2.description: Services for managing calendars, scheduling events, and finding availability.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub2.boundary: Excludes task management and project planning. For tasks, see 'Task & Project Management'. For meeting notes, see 'Note & Knowledge Management'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, reads, or modifies calendar events or manages schedules, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub20.name: Human-in-the-Loop Interaction
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub20.description: Services that facilitate interaction, feedback, and decision-making between AI systems and human users.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub20.boundary: Excludes fully automated workflows and solo task management. For automation, see 'Workflow & Process Automation'. For solo tasks, see 'Task & Project Management'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages prompts, approvals, or inputs from a human user within an AI-driven workflow, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub3.name: Note & Knowledge Management
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub3.description: Services for creating, organizing, and searching notes, documents, and personal knowledge bases.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub3.boundary: Excludes task management and calendar events. For tasks, see 'Task & Project Management'. For scheduling, see 'Calendar & Scheduling'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the creation, storage, or retrieval of notes or personal knowledge, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub4.name: Document Processing & Conversion
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub4.description: Services for converting, transforming, and processing documents between different formats (e.g., PDF, DOCX, Markdown).
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub4.boundary: Excludes document creation/collaboration and optical character recognition (OCR). For collaborative editing, see 'Document Collaboration'. For text extraction, see 'Content Extraction & OCR'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily converts document formats or processes document structure, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub5.name: Document Collaboration
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub5.description: Services for collaborative editing, versioning, and management of shared documents and files.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub5.boundary: Excludes document format conversion and personal note-taking. For conversion, see 'Document Processing & Conversion'. For personal notes, see 'Note & Knowledge Management'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables multi-user document editing or shared file workspace management, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub6.name: Content Extraction & OCR
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub6.description: Services for extracting text and data from documents, images, or web pages, including optical character recognition.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub6.boundary: Excludes document format conversion and web page automation. For conversion, see 'Document Processing & Conversion'. For browser automation, see 'Browser Automation & Scraping'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily extracts readable text or data from files or images, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub7.name: Browser Automation & Scraping
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub7.description: Services for programmatically controlling a web browser to navigate, interact with pages, and extract data.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub7.boundary: Excludes content extraction from static files and computer desktop automation. For file OCR, see 'Content Extraction & OCR'. For desktop control, see 'Desktop & OS Automation'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates interactions with or extracts data from web browsers, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub8.name: Desktop & OS Automation
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub8.description: Services for automating interactions with a computer's desktop, operating system, or local applications.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub8.boundary: Excludes browser automation and remote server control. For browser control, see 'Browser Automation & Scraping'. For remote servers, see 'Remote Access & SSH'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily controls the mouse, keyboard, screen, or local OS processes on a user's computer, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub3_sub9.name: Remote Access & SSH
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub9.description: Services for executing commands, transferring files, and managing systems on remote servers via protocols like SSH.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub9.boundary: Excludes local desktop automation and local terminal management. For local control, see 'Desktop & OS Automation'. For local terminal, see 'Terminal & CLI Management'.
cat_sub23a_sub3_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to and operates on remote servers or machines, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub1.name: Relational Database Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub1.description: Services for traditional SQL-based RDBMS like PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, and Oracle.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub1.boundary: Traditional SQL databases. Excludes distributed SQL, analytical databases, and non-relational systems.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with a traditional SQL-based RDBMS, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub10.name: Distributed & Analytical Database Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub10.description: Services for scalable SQL databases and analytical/OLAP systems.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub10.boundary: Distributed SQL databases and analytical databases. Excludes single-node RDBMS.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub10.decision_rule: If the service interacts with a distributed SQL or analytical database, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub13.name: Memory & Knowledge Persistence Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub13.description: Services for persisting application state, memory, or file-based knowledge.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub13.boundary: Agent memory, session state, and file-based knowledge systems. Excludes primary business data storage.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub13.decision_rule: If the service persists application/agent state or manages file-based knowledge, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub14.name: Database Administration & Integration Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub14.description: Services for database operations, lifecycle management, and multi-database connectivity.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub14.boundary: DBA tasks, migrations, performance tuning, and database abstraction layers. Excludes data querying services.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub14.decision_rule: If the service performs database administration or provides multi-database connectivity, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub15.name: Natural Language to Database Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub15.description: Services translating natural language prompts into database queries or commands.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub15.boundary: Core function is natural language to database operations. Excludes databases with NL as secondary feature.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub15.decision_rule: If the service's defining characteristic is converting natural language to database operations, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub16.name: Application Platform Database Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub16.description: Services for database operations within application deployment and hosting platforms.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub16.boundary: Database services integrated with app platforms like Render, Heroku. Excludes standalone database systems.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub16.decision_rule: If the service provides database operations as part of an application hosting platform, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub2.name: Vector & Semantic Search Database Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub2.description: Services for databases storing vector embeddings and enabling similarity search or semantic retrieval.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub2.boundary: Vector databases and search engines with semantic/vector capabilities. Excludes traditional full-text search engines.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub2.decision_rule: If the service enables vector storage, similarity search, or semantic retrieval, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub3.name: Graph Database Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub3.description: Services for databases storing data as nodes and edges, optimized for relationship traversal.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub3.boundary: Graph model databases. Excludes relational databases and other non-graph systems.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with a graph database or executes graph queries, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub4.name: Document Database Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub4.description: Services for databases storing flexible JSON-like documents without fixed schemas.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub4.boundary: Document-oriented databases. Excludes relational, graph, and key-value stores.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with a schema-less document database, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub5.name: Key-Value & Cache Store Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub5.description: Services for simple key-value databases, often used for caching and session storage.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub5.boundary: Key-value stores and caching systems. Excludes document databases and persistent data stores.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with a key-value database or cache, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub7.name: Cloud-Hosted Database Platform Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub7.description: Services for managed databases within proprietary cloud platforms or BaaS.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub7.boundary: Managed databases in platforms like Firebase, Supabase, Airtable. Excludes self-managed systems.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub7.decision_rule: If the service interacts with a managed database in a specific cloud/BaaS platform, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub4_sub8.name: Multi-Model Database Services
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub8.description: Services for databases natively supporting multiple data models in one engine.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub8.boundary: Databases combining models like document and graph. Excludes single-model databases.
cat_sub23a_sub4_sub8.decision_rule: If the service interacts with a database supporting multiple native data models, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub1.name: Source Code Security
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub1.description: Services that analyze, scan, or secure application source code for vulnerabilities, quality issues, or malicious patterns.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub1.boundary: Does not include scanning dependencies/libraries (see Dependency Security) or analyzing runtime applications/containers (see Application Runtime Security).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes or secures human/AI-written source code files, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub11.name: Supply Chain Security
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub11.description: Services that secure the software build, packaging, and deployment pipeline, including locking container images and CI/CD components.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub11.boundary: Does not include dependency scanning (see Dependency Security) or runtime protection (see Application Runtime Security).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily secures the build/deployment pipeline (CI/CD, containers, artifacts), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub16.name: AI Agent Security
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub16.description: Services that provide security, verification, fraud prevention, or hallucination detection specifically for AI agents and their outputs.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub16.boundary: Does not include secure execution for AI (see Secure Code Execution) or general code security for AI-generated code (see Source Code Security).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily secures or verifies the identity/actions of an AI agent/LLM, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub17.name: Technology Stack Identification
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub17.description: Services that fingerprint or identify the technologies, frameworks, and libraries used by a website or application.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub17.boundary: Does not include vulnerability assessment of identified technologies (see Vulnerability Intelligence) or code analysis (see Source Code Security).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub17.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to detect and list the technologies used by a target, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub18.name: Security Tool Integration
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub18.description: Services that act as connectors or bridges, allowing AI agents to interact with established security testing platforms (e.g., Burp Suite).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub18.boundary: Does not include the core security tools themselves (see other categories like Application Runtime Security).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub18.decision_rule: If the service is primarily an MCP adapter/integration for a third-party security testing platform, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub2.name: Dependency Security
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub2.description: Services that scan, vet, or manage third-party libraries, packages, and dependencies for vulnerabilities and malicious code.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub2.boundary: Does not include scanning custom source code (see Source Code Security) or container images (see Supply Chain Security).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes the security of external packages/libraries (e.g., npm, PyPI), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub3.name: Application Runtime Security
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub3.description: Services that protect, monitor, or test running web applications and APIs for attacks and vulnerabilities.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub3.boundary: Does not include static code analysis (see Source Code Security) or infrastructure/network security (see Network & Firewall Security).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with or protects a live, deployed application (e.g., WAF, DAST scanner), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub4.name: Secure Code Execution
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub4.description: Services that provide isolated, sandboxed, or permission-controlled environments for safely executing code, commands, or scripts.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub4.boundary: Does not include code analysis (see Source Code Security) or database interactions (see Secure Data Access).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub4.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to safely run code/commands in a controlled environment, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub5.name: Secure Data Access
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub5.description: Services that enable secure, controlled, and often read-only access to databases and file systems, with configurable permissions.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub5.boundary: Does not include general code execution (see Secure Code Execution) or cryptographic operations (see Cryptography Services).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides secure access to query or interact with databases/files, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub6.name: Vulnerability Intelligence
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub6.description: Services that aggregate, analyze, or provide data about known vulnerabilities (CVEs), risk scores, and security advisories.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub6.boundary: Does not include tools that actively scan for vulnerabilities (see Source/Dependency/Application Security categories) or manage remediation workflows.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides vulnerability data, feeds, or risk intelligence, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub7.name: Software Composition Analysis
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub7.description: Services that manage software bills of materials (SBOM), catalog software assets, and analyze components for compliance and quality.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub7.boundary: Does not include vulnerability scanning (see Dependency Security) or runtime application protection (see Application Runtime Security).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily catalogs software assets or analyzes composition for compliance/quality, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub5_sub8.name: Secrets & Credential Security
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub8.description: Services that detect, prevent, or manage leaks of API keys, tokens, passwords, and other sensitive credentials in code and repositories.
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub8.boundary: Does not include general code vulnerability scanning (see Source Code Security) or data encryption (see Cryptography Services).
cat_sub23a_sub5_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily focuses on detecting or preventing secret/credential exposure, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub1.name: Web Content Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub1.description: Services that search, extract, or convert content from websites and web pages.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub1.boundary: Focuses on public web content retrieval and extraction. Distinct from website technology analysis.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches or retrieves content from public websites or web pages, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub11.name: Database Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub11.description: Services that provide search capabilities over traditional databases.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub11.boundary: Covers full-text and field-based search in standard databases. Includes knowledge graphs.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides search over a standard database or knowledge graph, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub16.name: Cross-Platform Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub16.description: Services that search across multiple data sources or platforms simultaneously.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub16.boundary: Covers federated search across different systems. Must search multiple source types.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches across multiple distinct data source types (e.g., files + web + databases), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub2.name: Technical Documentation Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub2.description: Services that search official technical documentation, manuals, or API references.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub2.boundary: Covers vendor/platform documentation. Includes local system manuals (man pages).
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches official vendor/platform documentation or local system manuals, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub3.name: Code Repository Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub3.description: Services that search, analyze, or convert source code from repositories.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub3.boundary: Focuses on source code understanding. Includes AI model/dataset repositories.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches or semantically understands source code or AI model/dataset repositories, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub4.name: Internal Knowledge Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub4.description: Services that search internal organizational knowledge bases, wikis, or notes.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub4.boundary: Covers corporate and personal knowledge systems. Excludes public documentation.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches a company's internal knowledge base, wiki, or personal note-taking app, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub5.name: Vector Database Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub5.description: Services that perform semantic search or querying on vector databases.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub5.boundary: Exclusively for vector/semantic search operations. Distinct from traditional database search.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily queries a vector database for semantic similarity, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub6.name: Document Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub6.description: Services that search, process, or analyze documents for content extraction.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub6.boundary: Focuses on document files (PDF, text). Includes diagram/visual file search.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily processes or searches within document or diagram files for content, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub7_sub7.name: Local File System Search
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub7.description: Services that search for files or content on local machines or file systems.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub7.boundary: Covers local file operations including pattern matching. Excludes web/database search.
cat_sub23a_sub7_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches the local file system or performs pattern matching within files, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub1.name: Web & Game UI Testing
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub1.description: Services for automating and testing web and video game user interfaces, including browser and game engine interaction.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub1.boundary: Covers web UI testing (browser automation, visual verification) and game testing (game engine automation, interactive entertainment).
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates or tests interactions with web browsers, web UIs, or video game engines/interfaces, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub10.name: Feature Flag Management
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub10.description: Services for creating, managing, and toggling feature flags to control application behavior for testing and release.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub10.boundary: Covers feature flag creation, management, experimentation, and release control.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages feature flags/toggles for enabling/disabling features during testing, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub13.name: AI/LLM Application Testing
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub13.description: Services for testing, evaluating, and optimizing applications built with AI, large language models, or RAG systems.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub13.boundary: Covers AI model testing, LLM evaluation, prompt testing, and AI application validation.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily tests or evaluates the performance of AI models, agents, or LLM-based applications, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub14.name: Test Environment & Infrastructure
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub14.description: Services that provide isolated environments for testing and validate infrastructure/configurations.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub14.boundary: Covers secure sandbox environments, test execution isolation, and infrastructure/environment validation testing.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides isolated test environments or tests infrastructure/components/configurations, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub17.name: Observability & Session Analysis
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub17.description: Services for distributed tracing, debugging, and analyzing user sessions to identify issues.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub17.boundary: Covers distributed tracing, performance debugging, and user session recording/journey analysis for bug finding.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides tracing/observability data or analyzes recorded user sessions for debugging, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub19.name: Console/CLI Automation Testing
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub19.description: Services for automating and testing command-line interfaces, terminal applications, and console interactions.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub19.boundary: Covers CLI automation, terminal application testing, console interaction testing, and command execution validation.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates or tests interactions with command-line interfaces, terminals, or console applications, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub2.name: API Testing
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub2.description: Services focused on testing, validating, and interacting with Application Programming Interfaces (APIs).
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub2.boundary: Covers REST, GraphQL, SOAP, and other API testing, validation, and lifecycle management.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily tests, validates, or manages API endpoints and their lifecycle, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub3.name: Mobile & Cross-Platform App Testing
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub3.description: Services for automating and testing mobile, desktop, and cross-platform applications.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub3.boundary: Covers native, hybrid, and cross-platform application testing on mobile, desktop, and multi-platform environments.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates or tests interactions with mobile, desktop, or cross-platform applications, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub4.name: Performance & Resilience Testing
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub4.description: Services for testing system performance, scalability, and fault tolerance under load or adverse conditions.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub4.boundary: Covers load testing, stress testing, performance testing, and chaos engineering/resilience testing.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily executes tests that simulate concurrent users, traffic, or adverse conditions to measure performance or resilience, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub5.name: Code & Data Quality Analysis
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub5.description: Services for statically analyzing source code and validating data quality, integrity, and correctness.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub5.boundary: Covers static code analysis for quality metrics, bugs, style issues, and data validation/testing.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes source code statically for quality or validates data sets/pipelines for correctness, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub6.name: Security & Accessibility Testing
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub6.description: Services for identifying security vulnerabilities and testing accessibility compliance for users with disabilities.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub6.boundary: Covers vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, security analysis, and WCAG compliance/accessibility testing.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily tests for security flaws, vulnerabilities, or accessibility compliance, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub7.name: Test Generation
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub7.description: Services that automatically create test cases, scripts, or data from specifications, recordings, or other artifacts.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub7.boundary: Covers AI-generated tests, test case generation from requirements, and automated test script creation.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub7.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to automatically generate test artifacts (cases, scripts, data), classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub8.name: Test Execution & Orchestration
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub8.description: Services that run, schedule, and manage test execution within CI/CD pipelines or across environments.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub8.boundary: Covers test orchestration, CI/CD pipeline integration, test environment management, and execution scheduling.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily orchestrates, schedules, or triggers test execution within pipelines or environments, classify here.

cat_sub23a_sub8_sub9.name: Test Management & Analysis
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub9.description: Services for managing testing processes and analyzing test results, reports, and insights.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub9.boundary: Covers test case management, planning, traceability, and test reporting/analytics/dashboards.
cat_sub23a_sub8_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages test artifacts/lifecycle or analyzes/reports on test execution results, classify here.

cat_sub23b_sub1_sub1.name: Relational Database Services
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub1.description: Services for interacting with traditional SQL-based relational database management systems (RDBMS) like PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, and Oracle.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub1.boundary: Not for vector databases, NoSQL databases, or cloud data warehouses. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects to and operates on a standard SQL/relational database (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle), classify here.

cat_sub23b_sub1_sub11.name: Multi-Model & Lakehouse Services
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub11.description: Services for platforms that support multiple data models (relational, document, graph) or combine data warehousing with data lakes, like Databricks and Bauplan.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub11.boundary: Not for single-model databases. See sibling categories for specific database types.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with a platform that natively supports multiple data models or a unified lakehouse architecture, classify here.

cat_sub23b_sub1_sub12.name: Unified Cloud Data Platform Services
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub12.description: Services for comprehensive cloud platforms that bundle databases with compute, analytics, and other services, like Microsoft Fabric, Azure, and Convex.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub12.boundary: Not for standalone database services. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub12.decision_rule: If the service provides access to a broad cloud platform where the database is one integrated component among many (e.g., compute, storage, AI), classify here.

cat_sub23b_sub1_sub13.name: Database-as-a-Service (DBaaS) Platform Management
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub13.description: Services for managing database instances, deployments, and resources on fully managed cloud DBaaS platforms like Aiven, Render, and Heroku.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub13.boundary: Not for directly querying the data within a database. See sibling categories for query services.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs lifecycle management (deploy, scale, monitor) of database instances on a managed cloud platform, classify here.

cat_sub23b_sub1_sub15.name: AI-Augmented Database Services
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub15.description: Services that use AI/LLMs to enhance database interaction, such as generating queries, optimizing performance, or enabling natural language interfaces.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub15.boundary: Not for standard database connectors or services without an integrated AI/LLM layer for core functionality. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub15.decision_rule: If the service's core functionality uses an integrated AI/LLM to perform tasks like query generation, optimization, or natural language translation for the database, classify here.

cat_sub23b_sub1_sub16.name: Generic & Polyglot Database Connectors
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub16.description: Services that provide a single interface to connect to and operate on multiple, different types of databases through drivers like JDBC or ODBC.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub16.boundary: Not for services dedicated to a single database type or platform. See sibling categories for those.
cat_sub23b_sub1_sub16.decision_rule: If the service is a generic adapter or connector designed to work with many different database technologies through a common protocol, classify here.

cat_sub23b_sub1_sub17.name: Low-Code/No-Code Database Backends
