cat_sub30_sub3_sub13.name: Workflow Automation Platform
cat_sub30_sub3_sub13.description: Services for connecting to and executing workflows within dedicated automation and integration platforms.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub13.boundary: Not for task management, project management, or specific tool integrations. See sibling categories for those functions.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with or manages a workflow automation/iPaaS platform (e.g., iFlytek Workflow, MuleSoft), classify here.

cat_sub30_sub3_sub15.name: Integrated Workspace Suites
cat_sub30_sub3_sub15.description: Services that provide integrated access to multiple applications within a unified productivity suite.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub15.boundary: Not for services connecting to individual, standalone tools. See sibling categories for those functions.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with a multi-application productivity suite as a whole (e.g., Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Apple services), classify here.

cat_sub30_sub3_sub16.name: Developer Context & Assistance
cat_sub30_sub3_sub16.description: Services that provide AI coding assistants with context from various platforms to aid in software development.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub16.boundary: Not for direct code generation, version control, or project management. See sibling categories for those functions.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily aggregates context from productivity tools (docs, tickets, chat) to assist AI in coding, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub3_sub18.name: Real-Time Human-in-the-Loop
cat_sub30_sub3_sub18.description: Services that facilitate real-time human assistance or oversight within an AI-driven workflow or tool.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub18.boundary: Not for automation, task management, or collaboration without the real-time human intervention component. See sibling categories for those functions.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables real-time human assistance or supervision (HITL) within an AI process, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub3_sub2.name: Note & Knowledge Management
cat_sub30_sub3_sub2.description: Services for creating, organizing, and managing notes, outlines, and personal or team knowledge bases.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub2.boundary: Not for task management, document collaboration, or code/development. See sibling categories for those functions.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with or manages a note-taking or knowledge management platform (e.g., Workflowy, Anytype, card-based systems), classify here.

cat_sub30_sub3_sub20.name: MCP Server Management
cat_sub30_sub3_sub20.description: Services that manage, configure, and provide access to multiple MCP servers for AI agent clients.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub20.boundary: Not for productivity tool integrations or specific MCP server functions. See sibling categories for those functions.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages or provides a gateway to other MCP servers (e.g., a GUI config tool), classify here.

cat_sub30_sub3_sub3.name: Document Collaboration
cat_sub30_sub3_sub3.description: Services for creating, editing, and managing collaborative documents, wikis, and related content.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub3.boundary: Not for task management, note-taking, or spreadsheet/data table manipulation. See sibling categories for those functions.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with or manages a collaborative document or wiki platform (e.g., Confluence, Google Docs, HackMD, DocBase), classify here.

cat_sub30_sub3_sub4.name: Calendar & Scheduling
cat_sub30_sub3_sub4.description: Services for managing calendars, scheduling appointments, and handling time-based events.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub4.boundary: Not for task management, project tracking, or general communication. See sibling categories for those functions.
cat_sub30_sub3_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with or manages a calendar or scheduling platform (e.g., Cal.com, CalDAV, Google Calendar), classify here.

cat_sub30_sub7_sub1.name: Relational & SQL Databases
cat_sub30_sub7_sub1.description: Services connecting to traditional RDBMS (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle) using SQL.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub1.boundary: Focuses on standard relational databases with tabular schemas and SQL interfaces. Includes cloud-managed SQL services.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily connects to a single relational database (RDBMS) and executes SQL queries against it.

cat_sub30_sub7_sub2.name: Cloud Data Warehouses
cat_sub30_sub7_sub2.description: Services for analytics on large-scale cloud data platforms (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks SQL).
cat_sub30_sub7_sub2.boundary: Covers managed, scalable analytics databases optimized for complex queries on large datasets in the cloud.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily connects to a cloud-native, scalable data warehouse platform designed for analytical workloads.

cat_sub30_sub7_sub3.name: NoSQL & Specialized Databases
cat_sub30_sub7_sub3.description: Services for NoSQL, document, key-value, time-series, and other non-relational databases.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub3.boundary: Focuses on databases that don't primarily use SQL or fixed relational schemas. Includes MongoDB, Redis, Cassandra, InfluxDB, etc.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily connects to a NoSQL, document, key-value, time-series, or other specialized non-relational database.

cat_sub30_sub7_sub4.name: Vector & AI Databases
cat_sub30_sub7_sub4.description: Services for vector similarity search, embedding storage, and AI-enhanced data operations.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub4.boundary: Covers databases with native support for vector embeddings, semantic search, and direct AI model integration.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary purpose is vector search, embedding storage, or direct AI model integration with a database.

cat_sub30_sub7_sub5.name: Graph Databases
cat_sub30_sub7_sub5.description: Services for querying graph databases (Neo4j, TigerGraph) and knowledge graphs.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub5.boundary: Focuses on databases that use graph structures (nodes, edges) to represent and query relationships.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily connects to a graph database or manages knowledge graph data.

cat_sub30_sub7_sub6.name: Data Access & Federation
cat_sub30_sub7_sub6.description: Services providing unified querying, connectivity, or metadata management across multiple data sources.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub6.boundary: Covers federated query engines (Trino, Presto), generic connectivity layers (JDBC/ODBC), and data catalogs/metadata platforms.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service acts as a federated query engine, provides generic connectivity to multiple backends, or primarily catalogs/manages metadata about data assets.

cat_sub30_sub7_sub8.name: Spreadsheet & Low-Code Platforms
cat_sub30_sub7_sub8.description: Services for accessing data from spreadsheet-like and low-code application platforms.
cat_sub30_sub7_sub8.boundary: Covers platforms with a UI-first, tabular interface that can be accessed programmatically (Airtable, Baserow, Google Sheets).
cat_sub30_sub7_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily connects to a spreadsheet-like or low-code application platform used as a data source.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub1.name: Business Intelligence & Analytics
cat_sub30_sub8_sub1.description: Services for querying, exploring, and analyzing integrated business data from platforms like data warehouses and BI tools.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub1.boundary: Does not include services for unstructured data search, document processing, or real-time event streaming.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables querying and analysis of structured business data for insights, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub10.name: Conversational Memory & Context Management
cat_sub30_sub8_sub10.description: Services that provide persistent, searchable memory and context for AI assistants across conversations and sessions.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub10.boundary: Does not include services for general business analytics or enterprise knowledge graphs not tied to conversational context.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily maintains and retrieves context, history, or state for AI-driven conversations, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub2.name: Knowledge Management & Semantic Search
cat_sub30_sub8_sub2.description: Services for building, searching, and querying semantic knowledge graphs, vector stores, and enterprise knowledge bases.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub2.boundary: Does not include services for general business data querying or real-time data pipeline orchestration.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables semantic search, knowledge graph construction, or context retrieval from a knowledge base, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub3.name: Content & Document Processing
cat_sub30_sub8_sub3.description: Services for analyzing, parsing, and managing unstructured content like PDFs, documents, and published articles.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub3.boundary: Does not include services for structured data validation or real-time message streaming.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily processes and analyzes unstructured documents or published content, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub4.name: Real-time Data & Event Streaming
cat_sub30_sub8_sub4.description: Services for interacting with and managing real-time data pipelines, message brokers (like Kafka), and event streams.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub4.boundary: Does not include services for batch data analysis, document processing, or static knowledge management.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages or interacts with real-time data streams, topics, and event-driven pipelines, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub5.name: Data Quality & Governance
cat_sub30_sub8_sub5.description: Services for validating data, ensuring quality, and managing metadata, lineage, and data assets.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub5.boundary: Does not include services for data transformation pipelines, content search, or real-time streaming.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily validates data quality, traces data lineage, or manages metadata, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub6.name: Multi-source Data Integration
cat_sub30_sub8_sub6.description: Services that connect to and unify data from numerous disparate sources like databases, APIs, and applications.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub6.boundary: Does not include services focused on a single platform's data or specialized processing like OCR.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily acts as a connector or proxy to unify access to many different data sources, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub7.name: Workflow & Pipeline Orchestration
cat_sub30_sub8_sub7.description: Services for orchestrating, scheduling, and managing data workflows, ETL/ELT processes, and data pipelines.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub7.boundary: Does not include services for querying data within those pipelines or processing individual documents.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily schedules, executes, and monitors the flow of data between processing steps, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub8.name: Cloud Data Platform Operations
cat_sub30_sub8_sub8.description: Services for interacting with and operating specific cloud-native data platforms (e.g., Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, Alibaba DataWorks).
cat_sub30_sub8_sub8.boundary: Does not include generic database connectors or services for non-cloud-specific data processing.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides tools to operate within a specific cloud data platform's ecosystem, classify here.

cat_sub30_sub8_sub9.name: Cross-Application Data Search & Action
cat_sub30_sub8_sub9.description: Services that enable searching and taking actions on data spread across multiple SaaS applications and tools.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub9.boundary: Does not include services for searching within a single knowledge base or a unified data warehouse.
cat_sub30_sub8_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches and operates on data distributed across many different company applications, classify here.
